name: Mark Kelly
subject: It would mean the world to me if you could pitch in one more time before Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends --
We just wrapped up our final monthly fundraising deadline -- and so many of you stepped up to help us hit our goal.
I can't tell you how humbled I am to have your support -- but we aren't done yet.
There's only one day left before Election Day and we have to keep up the pace if we want to hold off the over $15 million Mitch McConnell backed groups have poured into this race in the final weeks.
That's why my team and I have set one final goal: **$1 million by Election Day.** If we can accomplish this goal before the election it'll give us the resources to fight back against the attack ads and make sure every vote is counted in this critical race. This is really important, so I'm coming directly to you:
[**If you are able, will you split a $3 donation between our last goal of this campaign and Maggie Hassan? It would mean the world to me if you could pitch in one more time before Election Day.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc602/2a380d31/2030b06e/f043d2/2130874691/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwMl9td2g0bWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201102_mwh4mk_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc602/2a380d31/2030b06e/f043d3/2130874691/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwMl9td2g0bWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201102_mwh4mk_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc602/2a380d31/2030b06e/f043dc/2130874691/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwMl9td2g0bWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201102_mwh4mk_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc602/2a380d31/2030b06e/f043dd/2130874691/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwMl9td2g0bWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201102_mwh4mk_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc602/2a380d31/2030b06e/f043d2/2130874691/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwMl9td2g0bWtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201102_mwh4mk_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Whether you are donating, signing up to volunteer, or sharing our social media posts -- every action you take goes a long way towards supporting this mission in these final days.
There's a lot at stake in this election, and Election Day is nearly here. So I'm looking forward to working with you to put in the hard work and win this race.
Full speed ahead!
-- Mark

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: Our Lives, Our Fortune, Our Sacred Honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Whether you are a Democrat, Republican, or Independent, I will be your representative. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b905e477ad&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | |
Dear Friend,

We started this campaign over a year and a half ago. Never did we imagine that on Election Day, we would be in the greatest health crisis this nation has seen since 1918 and the worst economic crisis since the Great Depression in 1929.

I understand that healthcare is a right, not a privilege. We need an economy that works for all, a robust public education system, and a renewed commitment to evidence, science and reason. It is our path forward out of COVID-19.

Whether you are a Democrat, Republican, or Independent, I will be your representative.

This election is not about being liberal or conservative. Instead, I am asking us to reclaim our Constitutional authority as “We the People.” We must be a united people. And in this district we must reclaim our moral authority and our goodness in Washington.

Security, love, faith, justice – these are our values. We must reclaim Dignity & Justice for All, not the few. As a united people, let us recommit to one another in the 21st Century our lives, our fortunes and our sacred honor.

I am asking you to send me to Washington as your Representative. I ask for your vote.

Thank you for all you have done over these many months,
Pat

---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5eededc08a&e=5886ca081d)

---
| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.

clean_body: Whether you are a Democrat, Republican, or Independent, I will be your representative. | | | | | | | Dear Friend, We started this campaign over a year and a half ago. Never did we imagine that on Election Day, we would be in the greatest health crisis this nation has seen since 1918 and the worst economic crisis since the Great Depression in 1929. I understand that healthcare is a right, not a privilege. We need an economy that works for all, a robust public education system, and a renewed commitment to evidence, science and reason. It is our path forward out of COVID-19. Whether you are a Democrat, Republican, or Independent, I will be your representative. This election is not about being liberal or conservative. Instead, I am asking us to reclaim our Constitutional authority as “We the People.” We must be a united people. And in this district we must reclaim our moral authority and our goodness in Washington. Security, love, faith, justice – these are our values. We must reclaim Dignity & Justice for All, not the few. As a united people, let us recommit to one another in the 21st Century our lives, our fortunes and our sacred honor. I am asking you to send me to Washington as your Representative. I ask for your vote. Thank you for all you have done over these many months, Pat | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change. | Pat Hackett for CongressPO Box 8066South Bend, IN 46660-8066 | | Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress

subject: Pre-Election Day Updates
body:
| | | | [ ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=aa66ef1062&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | Dear Friends,

We are almost at the finish line! More than[ 95 million voters](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6cc650692c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) have already cast their ballots — nearly 70% of the total ballots cast in 2016. Texas, North Carolina, Georgia, Florida, and Nevada have reached more than 90% of 2016’s turnout, with Texas at more than 100%.

News about the great voter turnout was amplified by the Biden campaign. Earlier today, Biden for President’s Campaign Manager Jen O’Malley Dillon with Former White House Counsel Bob Bauer discussed what to expect on Election Night and the enthusiasm we’re seeing across the country.

In the briefing, O’Malley and Bauer discussed the historic early voter turn out the campaign has seen, the timing behind vote-counting— keeping in mind the different time zones, the expansive and offensive map the campaign has cultivated that presents various paths to victory, and election administration efforts. Below you will find a breakdown of voting, vote counting, and multiple paths to 270 electoral votes.

The enthusiasm about voting is high, but there may be some questions about what to do on Election Day. This is why I am sharing some guiding principles and voter protection resources that could be useful to your networks to use on Election Day. This will be an unprecedented election, but I am confident that the infrastructure that has been built will provide the necessary resources for us to navigate a variety of situations. Please help us encourage our people to stay calm, remind folks of their rights, don’t get ahead of the Biden team in messaging, and remember our superpower is that “when they go low, we go high.” It’s been a proven, successful civil rights strategy for a reason.

Yours in the Fight,
Mũthoni
---
|
---
| **In this Update**
* Guiding Principles for Election Night
* Biden Campaign Breakdown: Early Vote, Vote Counting, Path to 270, Election Administration
* Voter Protection: How to Report Issues to Voter Protection
* How Voter Protection Responds to Incidents
* Battleground State Voter Protection Hotlines

---
|
---
| **GUIDING PRINCIPLES FOR ELECTION NIGHT _(please share)_**

**Encourage Calm:**
* We have held elections through pandemics, during world wars and, in 2020, we are having a well-executed election.
* Over the last several weeks, a record 93.5 million voters have voted by mail and voted in person. In most states, they have been able to do so in a manner that works best for them.
* There have been some hiccups and issues with voting, but the overwhelming majority of voting has occurred without incident. And, while we have seen some instances of aggressive behavior from Trump supporters, by and large voting has proceeded smoothly and we have not seen large-scale or coordinated voter suppression or intimidation efforts.
* It’s all of our responsibility to not amplify President Trump’s rhetoric. His goal is to make voters feel too scared to vote. Don’t play into his hands.

**Remind People of their Rights:**
* If you haven’t already voted: vote. Go to[ iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1d68ba2ef5&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
and find your polling information. If you are still holding onto your ballot, find your nearest drop box or county office and make your voice heard in this election.
* You have voting rights! They include, but are not limited to:
* The right to stay in line and vote if polls close while you are waiting inline
* The right to privately cast your ballot without interference
* The right to a paper ballot if you so choose
* The right to a provisional ballot if a poll worker tells you your name is not on the list
* The right to ask for a new ballot if you make a mistake on your ballot
* If you have any questions about your rights or trouble with voting:
* Call: 1-833-DEM-VOTE (English); 1-866-296-8686 (Spanish)
* Text: “ACCESS” to 43367 (English); “ACCESO” to 43367 (Spanish)

**Don't get ahead of the Biden team: **
* In calling the Presidential Race (whether it’s won, contested, or lost) we should wait for the official Biden channels (@JoeBiden // @TeamJoe) before we share anything.
* In calling states for the Presidential Race, we should wait for the official Biden channels (@JoeBiden // @TeamJoe) before we share anything. It’s likely they will “thank” the states as they are won.
* For Senate, Congressional, and down-ballot races, you should wait for official DNC channels (@TheDemocrats // @TomPerez // @TheDNC) to share the news. It’s likely they will be cautious in sharing results so as not to get put in the “penalty box” by Twitter. That’s okay. Our highest and best purpose is to not get any of our accounts frozen at any point throughout the night.

**When they go low, we go high: **
* Remember: Joe Biden has said numerous times, including during the last presidential debate, that he will be the president for every American-- including those who voted for him and those who didn’t.
* Make sure your messages are unifying and hopeful. This is what Joe Biden has tried to make this campaign about so honor your humanity and the humanity of others by not making callous or cruel remarks about anyone.
* As a general rule, do not engage with Trump supporters.
* Do not ridicule Trump supporters
* Do not wish ill on Trump supporters
* We joined this work because we believe in the potential of who America can and needs to be. **_Try to embody that today. _**

---
|
---
| **BIDEN CAMPAIGN BREAKDOWN: EARLY VOTE, VOTE COUNTING TIMING, PATH SCENARIOS, ELECTION ADMINISTRATION**

**Early Vote **
* Early vote - both in person and by mail - has seen historic turn out across the country: 93.5 million Americans have voted early. At this point in 2016, 50 million Americans had voted.
* This tells us that voters know the rules - they are motivated to vote, following the instructions, and their ballots are being accepted. [ IWillVote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=836195df0e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to make a plan.
* Our strategy in encouraging early voting was to reduce the number of ballots we had to chase and voters we needed to turn out.
* Going into Election Day, we believe our strategy was successful. The campaign banked leads in critical battlegrounds, and are focused over these final 36 hours on targeting our organizing efforts at our remaining supporters who haven’t cast a ballot yet.

**Vote Counting Timing**
* Different states have different rules for counting ballots, and that impacts when their votes will come in.
* When Trump says that ballots counted after midnight should be invalidated, he’s just making stuff up that has no historical precedent for how our elections run and he’s disenfranchising millions of Americans - including his own supporters.
* Not all of the ballots reported after Election Night will be ours. Many of them will be Trump’s voters.

**Path Scenarios**
* Trump needs Florida to win. It’s the key to his path to victory.
* If Trump wins Florida, North Carolina, and Georgia like he says he is going to, Biden still has a clear and viable path to 270.
* We don’t have a single path to victory, we have an expansive and offensive map.

**Election Administration**
* Trump is desperate. Trump has not given voters a reason to support him, so he is trying to scare them. Trump has failed as President on coronavirus, divided our country, and ruined our economy.
* And, Trump knows that voters get the final say on his failed presidency and will decide the results of the election. They will vote - as they have for the last 200 plus years - and they will decide who the President will be.
* We are running the largest and most well-resourced voter protection operation. We have tens of thousands of volunteer poll observers stationed at polling locations across the country during the early vote and on election day.
* Voters are turning out in record numbers. That is the best possible evidence that any sort of suppression or intimidation efforts that we are hearing about from the other side is not working.
* If they haven't already cast their ballot, every voter should feel safe going to vote on Tuesday and should go to

---
|
---
| **HOW TO REPORT ISSUES TO VOTER PROTECTION **

If an individual voter has a question or is facing a barrier to voting, they should call the National Voter Assistance Hotline: 1-833-336-8683.

If you want to relay an incident to the Voter Protection team, please ask the following questions before passing along the report, so that the Voter Protection team has the information it needs to address the issue:

**WHO** is affected and _WHO can we contact_ on the ground?
**WHAT** is the exact barrier to voting?
In **WHICH** county and, if possible, which polling place, is the incident occurring?
**How recently** did the incident occur?
**How many** voters are affected?
**How long** has this problem been going on?
Is the issue **still going on** or being fixed?
Is this incident **attracting media attention**?
---
|
---
| **HOW VOTER PROTECTION RESPONDS TO INCIDENTS**

The Voter Protection team both helps individual voters resolve issues they face that are preventing them from voting and focuses on broader trends affecting large numbers of people from voting.

Incidents affecting individuals will be shared with state boiler rooms. For more immediate assistance, individuals should contact the hotline. The National Voter Assistance Hotline number is 1-833-336-8683.
---
| In addition, each battleground state has a voter protection hotline. If the affected voter is in a battleground state, they should call their state’s Voter Protection hotline: | **Arizona** | **(833) 868-3429**
---|---

**Accessibility Textable hotline** | **(833) 923-2020**
| Incidents that are affecting a large number of voters (ex: long lines, voter intimidation outside of the polling place, issues with voting machines, etc), will be reported to our state boiler rooms so our Voter Protection teams can work with elections officials on the ground to resolve the problem.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends, We are almost at the finish line! More than have already cast their ballots — nearly 70% of the total ballots cast in 2016. Texas, North Carolina, Georgia, Florida, and Nevada have reached more than 90% of 2016’s turnout, with Texas at more than 100%. News about the great voter turnout was amplified by the Biden campaign. Earlier today, Biden for President’s Campaign Manager Jen O’Malley Dillon with Former White House Counsel Bob Bauer discussed what to expect on Election Night and the enthusiasm we’re seeing across the country. In the briefing, O’Malley and Bauer discussed the historic early voter turn out the campaign has seen, the timing behind vote-counting— keeping in mind the different time zones, the expansive and offensive map the campaign has cultivated that presents various paths to victory, and election administration efforts. Below you will find a breakdown of voting, vote counting, and multiple paths to 270 electoral votes. The enthusiasm about voting is high, but there may be some questions about what to do on Election Day. This is why I am sharing some guiding principles and voter protection resources that could be useful to your networks to use on Election Day. This will be an unprecedented election, but I am confident that the infrastructure that has been built will provide the necessary resources for us to navigate a variety of situations. Please help us encourage our people to stay calm, remind folks of their rights, don’t get ahead of the Biden team in messaging, and remember our superpower is that “when they go low, we go high.” It’s been a proven, successful civil rights strategy for a reason. Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni | | In this Update Guiding Principles for Election Night Biden Campaign Breakdown: Early Vote, Vote Counting, Path to 270, Election Administration Voter Protection: How to Report Issues to Voter Protection How Voter Protection Responds to Incidents Battleground State Voter Protection Hotlines | | GUIDING PRINCIPLES FOR ELECTION NIGHT (please share) Encourage Calm: We have held elections through pandemics, during world wars and, in 2020, we are having a well-executed election. Over the last several weeks, a record 93.5 million voters have voted by mail and voted in person. In most states, they have been able to do so in a manner that works best for them. There have been some hiccups and issues with voting, but the overwhelming majority of voting has occurred without incident. And, while we have seen some instances of aggressive behavior from Trump supporters, by and large voting has proceeded smoothly and we have not seen large-scale or coordinated voter suppression or intimidation efforts. It’s all of our responsibility to not amplify President Trump’s rhetoric. His goal is to make voters feel too scared to vote. Don’t play into his hands. Remind People of their Rights: If you haven’t already voted: vote. Go to and find your polling information. If you are still holding onto your ballot, find your nearest drop box or county office and make your voice heard in this election. You have voting rights! They include, but are not limited to: The right to stay in line and vote if polls close while you are waiting inline The right to privately cast your ballot without interference The right to a paper ballot if you so choose The right to a provisional ballot if a poll worker tells you your name is not on the list The right to ask for a new ballot if you make a mistake on your ballot If you have any questions about your rights or trouble with voting: Call: 1-833-DEM-VOTE (English); 1-866-296-8686 (Spanish) Text: “ACCESS” to 43367 (English); “ACCESO” to 43367 (Spanish) Don't get ahead of the Biden team: In calling the Presidential Race (whether it’s won, contested, or lost) we should wait for the official Biden channels (@JoeBiden // @TeamJoe) before we share anything. In calling states for the Presidential Race, we should wait for the official Biden channels (@JoeBiden // @TeamJoe) before we share anything. It’s likely they will “thank” the states as they are won. For Senate, Congressional, and down-ballot races, you should wait for official DNC channels (@TheDemocrats // @TomPerez // @TheDNC) to share the news. It’s likely they will be cautious in sharing results so as not to get put in the “penalty box” by Twitter. That’s okay. Our highest and best purpose is to not get any of our accounts frozen at any point throughout the night. When they go low, we go high: Remember: Joe Biden has said numerous times, including during the last presidential debate, that he will be the president for every American-- including those who voted for him and those who didn’t. Make sure your messages are unifying and hopeful. This is what Joe Biden has tried to make this campaign about so honor your humanity and the humanity of others by not making callous or cruel remarks about anyone. As a general rule, do not engage with Trump supporters. Do not ridicule Trump supporters Do not wish ill on Trump supporters We joined this work because we believe in the potential of who America can and needs to be. Try to embody that today. | | BIDEN CAMPAIGN BREAKDOWN: EARLY VOTE, VOTE COUNTING TIMING, PATH SCENARIOS, ELECTION ADMINISTRATION Early Vote Early vote - both in person and by mail - has seen historic turn out across the country: 93.5 million Americans have voted early. At this point in 2016, 50 million Americans had voted. This tells us that voters know the rules - they are motivated to vote, following the instructions, and their ballots are being accepted. to make a plan. Our strategy in encouraging early voting was to reduce the number of ballots we had to chase and voters we needed to turn out. Going into Election Day, we believe our strategy was successful. The campaign banked leads in critical battlegrounds, and are focused over these final 36 hours on targeting our organizing efforts at our remaining supporters who haven’t cast a ballot yet. Vote Counting Timing Different states have different rules for counting ballots, and that impacts when their votes will come in. When Trump says that ballots counted after midnight should be invalidated, he’s just making stuff up that has no historical precedent for how our elections run and he’s disenfranchising millions of Americans - including his own supporters. Not all of the ballots reported after Election Night will be ours. Many of them will be Trump’s voters. Path Scenarios Trump needs Florida to win. It’s the key to his path to victory. If Trump wins Florida, North Carolina, and Georgia like he says he is going to, Biden still has a clear and viable path to 270. We don’t have a single path to victory, we have an expansive and offensive map. Election Administration Trump is desperate. Trump has not given voters a reason to support him, so he is trying to scare them. Trump has failed as President on coronavirus, divided our country, and ruined our economy. And, Trump knows that voters get the final say on his failed presidency and will decide the results of the election. They will vote - as they have for the last 200 plus years - and they will decide who the President will be. We are running the largest and most well-resourced voter protection operation. We have tens of thousands of volunteer poll observers stationed at polling locations across the country during the early vote and on election day. Voters are turning out in record numbers. That is the best possible evidence that any sort of suppression or intimidation efforts that we are hearing about from the other side is not working. If they haven't already cast their ballot, every voter should feel safe going to vote on Tuesday and should go to | | HOW TO REPORT ISSUES TO VOTER PROTECTION If an individual voter has a question or is facing a barrier to voting, they should call the National Voter Assistance Hotline: 1-833-336-8683. If you want to relay an incident to the Voter Protection team, please ask the following questions before passing along the report, so that the Voter Protection team has the information it needs to address the issue: WHO is affected and WHO can we contact on the ground? WHAT is the exact barrier to voting? In WHICH county and, if possible, which polling place, is the incident occurring? How recently did the incident occur? How many voters are affected? How long has this problem been going on? Is the issue still going on or being fixed? Is this incident attracting media attention? | | HOW VOTER PROTECTION RESPONDS TO INCIDENTS The Voter Protection team both helps individual voters resolve issues they face that are preventing them from voting and focuses on broader trends affecting large numbers of people from voting. Incidents affecting individuals will be shared with state boiler rooms. For more immediate assistance, individuals should contact the hotline. The National Voter Assistance Hotline number is 1-833-336-8683. | In addition, each battleground state has a voter protection hotline. If the affected voter is in a battleground state, they should call their state’s Voter Protection hotline: | Arizona | (833) 868-3429 ---|--- Colorado | (720) 580-0148 Florida | (833) 868-3352 Georgia | (888) 730-5816 Iowa | (515) 293-6860 Maine | (207) 990-0788 Michigan | (833) 648-6837 Minnesota | (833) 335-8683 North Carolina | (833) 868-3462 Nebraska | (531) 201-0333 New Hampshire | (603) 466-8683 Nevada | (888) 525-8683 Ohio | (844) 644-8683 Pennsylvania | (833) 728-6837 Texas | (844) 898-6837 Virginia | (844) 482-8683 Wisconsin | (608) 336-3232 Spanish Language Hotline | (866) 296-8686 Accessibility Textable hotline | (833) 923-2020 | Incidents that are affecting a large number of voters (ex: long lines, voter intimidation outside of the polling place, issues with voting machines, etc), will be reported to our state boiler rooms so our Voter Protection teams can work with elections officials on the ground to resolve the problem. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com DNC Community Engagement 430 S Capitol Street, SE Washington, DC 20003 USA

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Final ask for Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek,
In 2016, Trump lost the popular vote by millions of votes but secured an Electoral College victory by winning a few battleground states by razor-thin margins. We know that the election in those battleground states will be very close once again. Let's be clear, Donald Trump is a clear and present danger to our democracy, and history will judge us harshly if we don't do everything we can to defeat him in these final hours. That’s why I’ve asked everyone to step up and hit this last-minute $10,000 fundraising goal by midnight tonight. Your contribution will go directly towards reaching out to voters in the final hours of this race. There's still plenty to do from online ads and sending more texts to making more calls to voters about how they can vote on Election Day. And every little bit has the potential to make the difference in this election. **[We’re still short of our $10,000 goal, so I’m asking you one last time before Election Day, will you chip in right now to help Joe Biden and Virginia Democrats win tomorrow?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y1Bh_id3OvrYtazv-v6tKtNj-ImSrZEYLAlLn4ZmPZrPrU9b9x1jJTc8SouYkjscFHf1VH4INADHkoutSDdJI2Jm2hLPr-gDHLfX_FlE-fGUjexsnIqJ4UN68vdT8uI546SXsOgA8yschZVv9ev2TQvofNMdBgr4Z9JyEc_vJ-bziZjz8M2p9vGl0WdiPc5ZijeEXrFlCnLRiODB_B36NbHWLiMEHiSv3JEWMlBCe6tgcD_E2lEB_cjSx01Y_GHK5Ll8XDY1cPTxMboMBi6T3f6rHl7d3s4I8uq_eQBz8lU8olZsnCLusjXH96ya4PweM/36k/7gbDtRlYQuW9aIAUxRdWCQ/h0/29P3UyVtERiqqrsBjlCtRYx8p7RcTQ_nxzgGtMFkGBk)** | | [**$5 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y1Bh_id3OvrYtazv-v6tKtNj-ImSrZEYLAlLn4ZmPZrPrU9b9x1jJTc8SouYkjscGxlmm4EmqrCTEalWvY0Sfijd_kGAfj4_fX3nwYTEUF3-ey-xxU8p7hgJaFl5Z2bn1LqvPvrlA4AcJfGGWm6oFKVFhUjuudW6O0dYQwspF7nB0vlWEDAtbvQXicT5huAyD_Z5hzSXUKnNRp3N0NCzTywsK7cNNI5dEa2cbmaz-4qFptuXRUojHm4S7Wk9Jl659FwW2PI2xUeOYklH5vfEuSvVerUaNzulknwdXyGOBBL3-6vLDYNE4O1fshXzzUNKejHR6MuxdvpN8P7_0VMliL/36k/7gbDtRlYQuW9aIAUxRdWCQ/h1/-1k98xJzAuzNhtnWYJH7jqsNm6-aoy7D8dqCc7FmWFI)

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: A simple message going into tomorrow:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I wanted to send one last
email before the polls open tomorrow morning.

It’s been an incredible past few months. Since January, we’ve registered
nearly 200,000 voters and have made more than 60 million voter contact
attempts. Yesterday alone we made another 2.6 million calls.

This is what democracy looks like.

You can feel the energy here in Texas. There is a movement that has been
building for a while, and I think we’re about to see just how strong it is
tomorrow night. It’s exciting, but our work isn’t over yet.

In these final hours, your help is needed now more than ever. There are
still thousands of voters who haven’t cast their ballots, and who you can
help through this process. Help us reach them:

Tomorrow's events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43992?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1001&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Calling Texas: The Last Mile Phone Bank with Jemele Hill and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43992?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1002&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Tuesday, November 3 at 1:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43992?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1003&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43993?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1004&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Calling Texas: The Last Mile Phone Bank with Kate Del Castillo and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43993?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1005&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Tuesday, November 3 at 3:30PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43993?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1006&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43980?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1007&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Calling Texas: The Last Mile Phone Bank with Rep. Veronica Escobar and
Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43980?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1008&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Tuesday, November 3 at 5:00PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43980?source=ema20201102-111438&t=1009&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y ]Get more info or RSVP »

None of this would be possible without grassroots supporters and
volunteers, like you. I know everyone says it, but it’s true. Beto and our
team were on all those phone banks, too, but we alone could not make those
millions of calls and send those millions of texts without our amazing
volunteers.

No matter how tomorrow goes (although we all, obviously, want it to go a
certain way), I am so proud of this team and what we’ve been able to
accomplish.

It’s now or never. Let’s
finish strong through this last mile.

David Wysong
Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1010&akid=111438%2E444211%2EJnOS1y

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Bill Olson
subject: Super Close - Last Call to Save American and Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:

Hi Peter,

My campaign is on the verge of pulling off one of the biggest upsets in political history. Mike Huckabee just endorsed me. My polling is showing us within the margin of error. Public polling has me also very close.

A massive turnout of Trump voters _**PUTS ME OVER THE TOP**_ and we take back the house!

[But I need to raise $3,460 more by midnight tonight to win. I have to get these last minute ads up before people vote tomorrow morning. Will you help me? Contribute whatever you can - any amount is very helpful!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iK6B1XJdyF6OuRU&b=rM2or3KchdwygSTK4BKLlg)

Darren Soto votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time! He is ripe for picking off and defeating. I want to send him a resounding defeat and make him pack his bags. [Please help me one last time before the BIG BIG day tomorrow.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iK6B1XJdyF6OuRU&b=rM2or3KchdwygSTK4BKLlg) I thank you!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iK6B1XJdyF6OuRU&b=rM2or3KchdwygSTK4BKLlg)

Bill Olson

Supports President Trump

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

P.S. [I really need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iK6B1XJdyF6OuRU&b=rM2or3KchdwygSTK4BKLlg), so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP! ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iK6B1XJdyF6OuRU&b=rM2or3KchdwygSTK4BKLlg)Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Asking one last time, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek,
In less than 24 hours, the polls will close, and votes will be counted in the most important election in our country's history.

By this time next week, here’s what I want to say:
* Joe Biden and Kamala Harris beat that clown Donald Trump by historic margins in Virginia and across the country
* Democrats took back the Senate, and Mark Warner won six more years as Virginia’s Senator
* Democrats expanded our House majority because Virginia Democrats now hold seats in 8 of our 11 Congressional districts

Derek, that’s a lot, but right now, it’s all within reach. But only if we do our jobs and get out the vote in these final 24 hours. **[Please contribute to my effort to help Virginia Democrats win up and down the ticket. In these final moments, every little bit helps.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkaS2UCFNdi4JJWbbJt-50B5gGOMH8-R6s0QfjoLqK1LUCBoLwR2qx3RT47vMxqdBStdpPpaNJfnDTSfA4cgqAfja2IgleBJt0Ei92moCV9w-9W5INwYVeqOZAPL74vRl-opWHVeAAZ5F2pXBdWAjNpvjwkvbT9heb5mM9qYJjQPlFokI-rQLxck2bRU6S9Fz9YXZsEzdJt8c51hRYutDEpirYWVQtg1kxbsUo1KikR-e3BNT7MKnLl14PAetRFS944z__zEcu1Ie2SkcekZFskbsHzyqUORx6I_BmNBISM6FGneeqBK9rjMWpz0BIHAa3/36k/1lg_ANj3RnOBXI1igUecsQ/h0/qetpm1ngnvjOQO0j4A4C7vWys6QiusqPvZWC9SO6PRw)** | | [**$5 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkaS2UCFNdi4JJWbbJt-50B5gGOMH8-R6s0QfjoLqK1LUdvfnvp7CR7Ra087jBtWbZiIiWhZa3zoz3uBVcTQ0PpChtN2N5z-vjxCmh_jj9FO0Au-hVL1ZLtiwSlkuHnwrcUiQXyzQ1EK-baKUxIUq8a1r6Qr93H9VeF9oLTM7hnca10Ln7eUYvL_su6wvuNMcA6UQl91wWqRHPEgwhDOTaap8NYFxMb5TTIfsrn_nQx4VTTIoIK9UMRIoJrYjsKD4B5yAZvzxj_aeWDLt0X0fmkFUppvGLaO58Mr_XLznDgtTx0ke8jab4xe-fsimoTxXzKtC2FiuHsz6fKTclS3Jk4A/36k/1lg_ANj3RnOBXI1igUecsQ/h1/oBTvuCT2GP1fDWVzIXQI03brejyOAdpnZnc-yTPLuXM)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Did Your Neighbor Vote?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA (R)
body:
Exactly 24 Hours! It's Not Too Late |
---
| |
---
| |
# _24 Hours Until Polls Close_
**Tomorrow is a big day for these United States and the Great State of Montana. Gaining control of the House, maintaining the Senate, and ensuring Donald Trump has four more years is on the line. We need to keep a businessman in the Whitehouse.**
**Let’s send a message. Let’s not just win, but _WIN BIG! _**
**Montana will give Donald Trump three of the 270 electoral votes he needs for reelection. We need to ensure that he wins the popular vote as well. **
**Make sure your neighbors, friends, and family voted. **
**Don’t mail your ballot. It’s too late. Don’t know where to drop it off? Check the Sec. of State site here to find out: [HERE> ](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=7d26e530b5&e=a212bb87cc)**
**Still have questions....Call my campaign directly at 406-670-8522.**
**Thank you for all you do!

-Troy Downing**

We need you to take the shot. | "BEAT THE BUZZER FOR $25" | "BEAT THE BUZZER FOR $50" | "BEAT THE BUZZER FOR $100" | "BEAT THE BUZZER FOR $250" | "BEAT THE BUZZER FOR ANOTHER AMOUNT" | If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically. This one’s a barn burner. Let’s leave it all out there. Patrick | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change. | Pat Hackett for CongressPO Box 8066South Bend, IN 46660-8066 | | Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress

# Today is Election Day! Go Vote!
---
It's time to Go Vote! Here are the polling locations for Today! [www.miadmason.com/2020vote](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=259856.1204.1.bbf60f396f63325a20762e4d2b35021f&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MDY3NTI4Ny0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My0wNGU0ODliZjAzYjk4YmZkOGExY2Q3MTNhNTkyYTY5YTUyYmY0M2ZjIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI1OTg1NiJ9) Just remember we have same-day voter registration. If you need to register, update your registration, or find your polling place: [www.miadmason.com/2020vote](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=259856.1205.1.d154f3cdaf5281508720ab05dd89ae88&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MDY3NTI4Ny0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My0wNGU0ODliZjAzYjk4YmZkOGExY2Q3MTNhNTkyYTY5YTUyYmY0M2ZjIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI1OTg1NiJ9)
---
---
## Join us this Evening!
---
We're providing our live results as ballots coming via our team tonight starting at 10 pm. RSVP: [Click Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=259856.1206.1.14008b6d217bc9bfb52a73ea37bbba04&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MDY3NTI4Ny0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My0wNGU0ODliZjAzYjk4YmZkOGExY2Q3MTNhNTkyYTY5YTUyYmY0M2ZjIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI1OTg1NiJ9)
---
---
## Thank you for your support and help!
---
We had nothing in our treasury against Andy’s $1.5 million. No one knew who we were. No one thought we had a chance. It was a true David vs. Goliath fight – except this time, David was an LGBTQ woman. No one thought we could do it but you. You the volunteers and campaign staff who worked long hours and reached every corner of our district on both sides of the Bay. You the people who donated because you believed in us. And you, Sarah, my beloved spouse, who has supported me and inspired me to run for us all. You, all of you made this possible because you believed in me and our message. And slowly at first, but thanks to your efforts, the voters heard our message. They understood that you can get sick and get a huge medical bill and need good, affordable health insurance whether you are a Republican or Democrat. They understood that your house can be flooded by tidal floods due to climate change whether you are a Republican or Democrat. Our message, a progressive message, worked even in the most conservative district because at its core it is based on one important truth: We are all more alike than we are different. The people of this district are speaking today and I hear you. I hear you telling me that you want to change, regardless of party affiliation.
---
**Warm Regards,** **Friends of Mia Mason**
---

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c328de4a6ed1695c/93c43bfdf3d4b773c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, The polls just opened, and I want to make sure you get there to help me FIRE D.C. Jeanne Shaheen. The Democrats know that if they want any chance of flipping the Senate majority to their favor, it is going to come through New Hampshire. They absolutely need to keep this seat, so they are pulling out all the stops to keep me from winning! President Trump and I are both counting on YOU to help us win big in the Granite State and flip it RED today. Please, if you haven’t cast your ballot yet GO VOTE ASAP, and don’t go alone.

Bring family members, friends, neighbors, and anyone you know who hasn’t voted yet. We need to score a decisive victory... and every vote counts! [FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c328de4a6ed1695c/189a43ee74216138c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Thank you, again, for all of your support throughout this race. We’ve fought relentlessly to let voters know exactly what’s at stake, and to win their support.

Now, it all comes down to getting our supporters who have not yet voted to the polls.

**Let’s finish this race firing on all cylinders and celebrate a big win tonight!**

To Victory,
Corky Messner [FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c328de4a6ed1695c/043200a48adbdbc5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) id:2020-10-26-19:03:53:459t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c328de4a6ed1695c/e4f2ac86fa5af31cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c328de4a6ed1695c/95fb12d4762c7ea8c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

President Trump and I are both counting on YOU to help us win big in the Granite State and flip it RED today. Please, if you haven’t cast your ballot yet GO VOTE ASAP, and don’t go alone. Bring family members, friends, neighbors, and anyone you know who hasn’t voted yet. We need to score a decisive victory... and every vote counts! Thank you, again, for all of your support throughout this race. We’ve fought relentlessly to let voters know exactly what’s at stake, and to win their support. Now, it all comes down to getting our supporters who have not yet voted to the polls. Let’s finish this race firing on all cylinders and celebrate a big win tonight! To Victory, Corky Messner id:2020-10-26-19:03:53:459t | | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

2020 ELECTION DAY DONOR STATUS: MISSING
Friend,

TODAY IS ELECTION DAY! I’ve been meeting Patriots across the Nation, and never before have I seen such incredible support and enthusiasm for my father.

Our President has slashed taxes, cut through red tape, and let the economy soar to heights other Presidents have only dreamed of. He’s rebuilt the mighty American military, killed terrorist leaders, and secured our border.

| Peter,
Today is Election Day!
We have worked tirelessly to get to this point, and now is the time to get to your polling station and cast your ballot. In such a contentious election year, it is absolutely vital that every great Floridian gets out and votes.
---
| | | [VOTER INFORMATION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015LOnJotbr1pvr2LYjyfa3K9O1sZDF8LSjym3P6YNDNVfwK9AnCI5Kg78oKo9Q3ubuRN_Hzv4n25Xm4TuetkJ5GuORbMzE5aPMmwUxFobQ5l-HN-yACyAf9dGzFUIeFVTS5oI4VLzSaiuKQKsdd0Qe-COAl2a9U_Q&c=DtUtWumMpZs-COiOk8Cm4FWEUXNyGIWMi-h5EjcMfLL9rWMOi0zG6Q==&ch=8YFI8OwHyHBU3dIW2CUqHuDhUNNKGaVJuEIVAufjI2IAnscFGATaFQ==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015LOnJotbr1pvr2LYjyfa3K9O1sZDF8LSjym3P6YNDNVfwK9AnCI5KkMPoKhe6pLR5wmRrfd7D6MIuKafqzuQs9dJrcJ9YHh82lWFF1gPTFh-Dcic2FeryAywYN4wVDL6IyWRER7qSvk1Sde4o0tXO0WVJQ0eQLXCVpeA-KDCaQQ=&c=DtUtWumMpZs-COiOk8Cm4FWEUXNyGIWMi-h5EjcMfLL9rWMOi0zG6Q==&ch=8YFI8OwHyHBU3dIW2CUqHuDhUNNKGaVJuEIVAufjI2IAnscFGATaFQ==)
---
| There are two distinct paths America could take going forward. We could go the way of the radical Democrats, and defund our police, raise taxes to fund the Green New Deal, and open the borders. In this future, America would be less safe, weaker, and less prosperous.
OR, we could MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN...AGAIN! In this path forward, we will continue to recover from the pandemic, building our economy back better than ever, getting folks jobs that need to put food on the table for their families, continue putting China on notice, give the necessary support to our first responders, and bring our immigration policy into the 21st century.
We are ready to get to work for Floridians, but you have to get out the vote to give us the green light to start. Our communities are depending on you.
Thanks for your continued support!
For Florida,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz
---

body:
GO VOTE
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A0nlUvfUv0y7p6Pz0mGMA9MHBNqsMzq2-1gqVWY9S-3Bh1wqZCKRkMdb6wDzqU_DcOxmPhJSt0chNjPRtvm7d5MY00FJOdyWMHnJWj7FkTg_p6DVhSTza83iZGAL7bwOSQtEewYF_Z9m_okWNc1vTvbufF3Oui5iaWHDab6tIQM=&c=ljIXeyLtugZUY1DbA06-2ToM--_PoiYSVLX0R4GSn3kyOKUm6zioyA==&ch=qF2RxudROFw0uoY6TtN3XEFZ72kOm7a6siVQAiNESAcNBhvQiUPHyQ==)
---
| Patriot,
The day is finally here!
After a long election season full of many unique challenges, the time has come for the incredible, hard-working people of Florida to cast their ballots and make their voices heard in the 2020 Election!
I can't thank you all enough for all of the support that has helped my campaign up to this point.
---
| | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A0nlUvfUv0y7p6Pz0mGMA9MHBNqsMzq2-1gqVWY9S-3Bh1wqZCKRkMdb6wDzqU_DcOxmPhJSt0chNjPRtvm7d5MY00FJOdyWMHnJWj7FkTg_p6DVhSTza83iZGAL7bwOSQtEewYF_Z9m_okWNc1vTvbufF3Oui5iaWHDab6tIQM=&c=ljIXeyLtugZUY1DbA06-2ToM--_PoiYSVLX0R4GSn3kyOKUm6zioyA==&ch=qF2RxudROFw0uoY6TtN3XEFZ72kOm7a6siVQAiNESAcNBhvQiUPHyQ==)
---|---
|
The only thing that I ask of you now is for your VOTE, so that I can get to work keeping Florida's 3rd District a place where hard-working, conservative values will ring true for generations to come!

When so many outside groups were rooting for us to fail, patriots like YOU made sure that our mission stayed on track.

Thank you once again for that generosity and support!
| Be sure to make your plans to VOTE TODAY so that all of our hard-work ends in a conservative victory!
---
| For Florida,
---

---
| Kat Cammack Republican Nominee for Congress, FL-03

body:

---
Well, it's Election Day, friends. If you voted early or by mail, you can [_**click here to check that your ballot was received**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21140293/259710408/-1863276470?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTY4ODkwMC1kZDFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zX32QT40c8mTixoGM5jOt2lZwWPNI8cArAHScIenP64=&emci=0f463363-511d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=59688900-dd1d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=10438639). But if you’re planning on voting today, [_**click here to find your polling place**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21140294/259710409/-115493227?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTY4ODkwMC1kZDFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zX32QT40c8mTixoGM5jOt2lZwWPNI8cArAHScIenP64=&emci=0f463363-511d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=59688900-dd1d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=10438639). Be sure to make a plan to vote and prepare ahead of time. Texans are enthusiastically voting this year, and that could mean a longer than normal wait time. So, pack a snack and some water just in case! And don’t forget to make sure your friends and family if they’ve voted or have a plan to vote. Thank you! Team Kennedy | | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
---

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Team Hagerty’s Statewide Get Out The Vote Tour
body:
**Team Hagerty 's Statewide Get Out The Vote Tour**On Election Day eve, Bill Hagerty traveled across the state to meet Tennesseans as part of his Get Out The Vote Tour. Joined by Senator Marsha Blackburn, Bill today traveled to West and East Tennessee, meeting and speaking with Tennesseans about the issues that matter most to them.**Tennesseans Love Trump** Hagerty and Blackburn stopped by the Shelby County GOP headquarters to speak with Tennesseans about the need to get out and vote for President Donald Trump. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirwdt-fuutjhhtj-r/) **Good Morning Memphis** While in Shelby County, Hagerty and Blackburn spoke with WMC in Memphis about Election Day and the need to get out and re-elect President Donald Trump for four more years. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirwdt-fuutjhhtj-y/) **Lunch In Jackson** Hagerty and Blackburn made a pit stop in Jackson to meet and speak with Tennesseans at Brooks Shaw's Old Country Store. While they were there, Bill and Senator Blackburn reminded folks to make a plan and get to the polls tomorrow. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirwdt-fuutjhhtj-j/) **Chattanooga Choo Choo** After a successful day on the trail, Hagerty and Blackburn ended the day in Chattanooga, speaking with members of the media about their Election Day outlook and why President Trump will win BIG in Tennessee. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirwdt-fuutjhhtj-t/) To stay up to date with Bill's tour, follow along on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram at @BillHagertyTN. | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirwdt-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirwdt-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirwdt-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirwdt-fuutjhhtj-o/)
---|---|---|---

Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: VOTE TODAY!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
Today is Election Day!! Have you voted yet??

**It doesn’t matter which state you live in, you must cast your vote for Donald Trump today, if you haven’t already done it! **

While elections are always important, and have grown in importance as the federal government has grown out of control, the consequences of this election are bigger than ever.

We have seen organized violence in many of our cities – in fact, nearly every night in some cities for 8 months – perpetrated by people who hate America and freedom, and who literally want communist revolution. I believe they are financed, in part, by our enemies abroad, like China.

**These violent communist revolutionaries will be emboldened and empowered, with the full force of the federal government at their backs, if Joe Biden wins today.**

Or, what if Joe Biden wins tomorrow, or next week, because of fraudulent mail-in ballots and the other many ways that Democrats have been found to cheat over the years? What if we don’t turn out enough Trump votes to overcome the margin of fraud we know will exist?

Not only does President Trump have to win tonight, he has to win decisively, with enough of a cushion to negate cheating, and to overcome the media’s narrative that President Trump is the one who “stole” the election. You know it’s coming if President Trump is re-elected. We need a landslide.

**So, make sure you vote, if you haven’t already.** If you need help, search online for your local county elections website, or ask someone you trust. You can also call your local Republican party; just search online for the contact information.

And, don’t forget to pray for President Trump, all of our leaders, and our nation.

May God Bless America,

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---

clean_body: | | Today is Election Day!! Have you voted yet?? It doesn’t matter which state you live in, you must cast your vote for Donald Trump today, if you haven’t already done it! While elections are always important, and have grown in importance as the federal government has grown out of control, the consequences of this election are bigger than ever. We have seen organized violence in many of our cities – in fact, nearly every night in some cities for 8 months – perpetrated by people who hate America and freedom, and who literally want communist revolution. I believe they are financed, in part, by our enemies abroad, like China. These violent communist revolutionaries will be emboldened and empowered, with the full force of the federal government at their backs, if Joe Biden wins today. Or, what if Joe Biden wins tomorrow, or next week, because of fraudulent mail-in ballots and the other many ways that Democrats have been found to cheat over the years? What if we don’t turn out enough Trump votes to overcome the margin of fraud we know will exist? Not only does President Trump have to win tonight, he has to win decisively, with enough of a cushion to negate cheating, and to overcome the media’s narrative that President Trump is the one who “stole” the election. You know it’s coming if President Trump is re-elected. We need a landslide. So, make sure you vote, if you haven’t already. If you need help, search online for your local county elections website, or ask someone you trust. You can also call your local Republican party; just search online for the contact information. And, don’t forget to pray for President Trump, all of our leaders, and our nation. May God Bless America, Jenny Beth Martin | PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. © 2020 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Suite 116-328 Woodstock, GA 30189 |

**FROM THE TEAM**

**TODAY is Election Day! **Get out and vote, Delaware! Polls are open until 8 pm.

Still have your vote-by-mail or absentee ballot? **DO NOT PUT YOUR BALLOT IN THE MAIL.** Drop your ballot off at a secure drop box in your county until 8 PM today. For locations and more information, visit: de.gov/ballotbox

For polling place information, visit: ivote.de.gov

For the voter protection hotline, call: 1-833-DEL-DEMS

We’ve all seen the left’s blueprint for chaos and disorder. From supporting riots to defunding the police, the future the left wants isn’t a future Oklahomans can afford. If you haven’t cast your ballot yet, please go vote as soon as possible. If you’re able, bring family members, friends, neighbors, and anyone you know who hasn’t voted yet. We need to score a decisive victory to send a message to liberals across the nation that Oklahoma isn’t for sale! name: Chair Mancini
subject: It's Election Day. Everyone is voting. Make YOUR Plan Now.
body:
So many of your friends and family have already voted early in-person - 2.3 MILLION in Tennessee alone. Now is the time for you show up at the polls.
Dear Peter,
**IT'S ELECTION DAY!**
Today is the day we've all been waiting for. Election Day is finally here. We don't have a second to waste, so we'll cut to the chase.
Everyone is voting this year.
Early voting numbers are breaking records across the country.
So many of your friends & family have already voted early - _**2.3 MILLION**_ in Tennessee alone.
**MAKE __YOUR__ PLAN TO VOTE TODAY.** [Use this link to easily locate your Election Day polling location](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21145821/259735160/-505603136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDc2YTQ1YS1lNzFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBH6PNHEEnl-zQUu3nWrwgScTO_tKJYq4iJN8gxAK6s=&emci=e46f8b03-751d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=6076a45a-e71d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892).
Here's a short list to help you make your plan to vote:
* What time will you go? In the morning? After lunch? After work?

* [Click here to find your polling location.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21145822/259735161/179162750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDc2YTQ1YS1lNzFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBH6PNHEEnl-zQUu3nWrwgScTO_tKJYq4iJN8gxAK6s=&emci=e46f8b03-751d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=6076a45a-e71d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)

* Remember to bring your Photo ID. [The list of accepted IDs is at this link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21145823/259735162/-221411079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDc2YTQ1YS1lNzFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBH6PNHEEnl-zQUu3nWrwgScTO_tKJYq4iJN8gxAK6s=&emci=e46f8b03-751d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=6076a45a-e71d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892).

* [Vote for Democratic candidates up and down the ballot!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21145824/259735163/-2139863518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDc2YTQ1YS1lNzFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBH6PNHEEnl-zQUu3nWrwgScTO_tKJYq4iJN8gxAK6s=&emci=e46f8b03-751d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=6076a45a-e71d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)

* Save the TNDP voter protection hotline number to your phone: 1-855-486-8386

**IF YOU HAVE ANY PROBLEMS VOTING, CALL US: **If you have any problems voting, do not hesitate to call the Tennessee Democratic Party Voter Protection Hotline number: 1-855-4VOTETN (1-855-486-8386). Remember, no voter should be turned away from the polls.
**Questions? Call** 1-855-4VOTETN (1-855-486-8386).
Thank you for being a Tennessee Voter!
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21145825/259735164/359870512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDc2YTQ1YS1lNzFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBH6PNHEEnl-zQUu3nWrwgScTO_tKJYq4iJN8gxAK6s=&emci=e46f8b03-751d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=6076a45a-e71d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Polls are open!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/3Yl5Fn1BAjvBdHYc1S9f1B6xXQQ_H-RbAlA6Qo_XVgk=/8plA6vo-9vEvKTYEwSHvv7GfVKZjG2fYTlfrpdE3G4g=)
---
| Peter, Election Day is finally here! Central Virginians are voting in record-breaking numbers this year, and today we need to finally take it home. As I've traveled around our district visiting early voting locations, I have been inspired by the tremendous enthusiasm I've seen from voters. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3Yl5Fn1BAjvBdHYc1S9f1B6xXQQ_H-RbAlA6Qo_XVgk=/k64W6Oywq_9sBkv_4iV6uJgWOzhtA3aztOpawO_oHKs=) I've spoken to all kinds of voters: people voting for the very first time, people who brought their children or grandchildren with them to witness the civic process, and people who waited in line in the rain and the cold. It's been an amazing testament to people's belief in the power of their voice and their faith in our country. So please, if you haven't yet voted, be sure to get to the polls today. Thank you, _Abigail _ P.S. We are still running a massive voter outreach operation all day today. If you would like to help us reach every last voter before close of polls, [_**please click here to make a contribution.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/3Yl5Fn1BAjvBdHYc1S9f1B6xXQQ_H-RbAlA6Qo_XVgk=/8plA6vo-9vEvKTYEwSHvv7GfVKZjG2fYTlfrpdE3G4g=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Hackett?=
subject: Friend, let's win this together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
It's time to vote for Dignity and Justice for All. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1ab61d41bc&e=5886ca081d)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

This is it. This is our time to restore our voice and values in Washington. It’s our time to send Jackie home once and for all.

Our data shows that Pat has been leading through early voting, but Jackie is catching up. This race is going to be tight, but we can win this. The numbers are there, we just need them at the polls.

If you’ve been holding on to your ballot, you have until noon to deliver it to [your county clerk's office](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=84a0a4f494&e=5886ca081d).

Polls close at 6 p.m. local time. It’s not too late to make your vote plan. It’s not too late to make your voice heard. If you need help finding your polling location, visit [vote.org](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=4ff42c040f&e=5886ca081d).

If you run into any trouble at the polls, call the Indiana voter hotline at 866-IN1-VOTE (866-461-8683).

This is no ordinary time, and this is no ordinary election. We must take action if we want to see change. So much is riding on your vote: Health care, education, the economy, and Dignity and Justice for All.

Friend, let’s win this together.

Team Hackett
---

clean_body: It's time to vote for Dignity and Justice for All. | | | | | | | Dear Friend, This is it. This is our time to restore our voice and values in Washington. It’s our time to send Jackie home once and for all. Our data shows that Pat has been leading through early voting, but Jackie is catching up. This race is going to be tight, but we can win this. The numbers are there, we just need them at the polls. If you’ve been holding on to your ballot, you have until noon to deliver it to . Polls close at 6 p.m. local time. It’s not too late to make your vote plan. It’s not too late to make your voice heard. If you need help finding your polling location, visit . If you run into any trouble at the polls, call the Indiana voter hotline at 866-IN1-VOTE (866-461-8683). This is no ordinary time, and this is no ordinary election. We must take action if we want to see change. So much is riding on your vote: Health care, education, the economy, and Dignity and Justice for All. Friend, let’s win this together. Team Hackett | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change. | Pat Hackett for CongressPO Box 8066South Bend, IN 46660-8066 | | Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress

* **What are voting hours?** 7:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. in Wisconsin
* [**Where do I vote?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjyud-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Click to find your polling place
* [**Confirm/Update your voting information**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjyud-ahkdjtlkr-t/)

* **Already voted?[Track your absentee ballot](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjyud-ahkdjtlkr-h/)**

Thanks for everything you've done this campaign. We can't wait to bring it home tomorrow.Thanks,

name: Susie Lee
subject: A Personal Note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21147800/259745308/-1839819742?refcode=BSP_EM_FR_X_logo_UX_XX&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGE3NDIwNS1lZTFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-JjR8tN7zx6Jpm-WqQP6x6Qd4DAGri6gptV1Ui91upg=)

| | Dear Friends and Supporters, As I wake up on this Election Day, I wanted to take a moment to thank all of you for rising to the moment, and giving it your all — whether it was calling, texting, knocking, writing, or sending money to help me get our voters out today. I feel the weight of the stress and division in this country and should I be victorious, hope to be a positive force in a period of rebuilding and healing our country. I decided to run for Congress for two reasons. First, given my experience of helping our most vulnerable neighbors overcome the systemic barriers that poverty creates, I felt a responsibility to do whatever it takes to break down those barriers. And second, like so many of us, I was frustrated by the divisiveness and dysfunction that seems to paralyze Washington, making progress seem almost impossible. I will be honest, while I am proud to have been true to my commitment to work across the aisle, create relationships, and roll up my sleeves to help make progress, so much more can be done. I still remain frustrated, like many of us. And I am disappointed that our leaders were unable or unwilling to reach a compromise that would have provided a lifeline to millions of Americans and thousands of Nevadans who are suffering because of this pandemic. I had tried to use my voice to fight for a deal, but it came up short. Much more work needs to be done. When people feel loss or defeat, as I did when it became obvious that a deal remained elusive, we can react in one of two ways. To walk away -- or to learn from our defeat, pick ourselves up, and overcome. I think you all know where I will always fall. I believe today is a referendum on our Democracy. I believe that Americans, especially young Americans, have come out in record numbers to preserve the one thing that has made America great — that all of us, regardless of who we are, the religion we practice, the color of our skin, or where we live, have a chance to live in freedom and have equal access to opportunity. I am hopeful that the voters of Congressional District 3 will recognize, despite the negative campaign, that I will continue to work with intent, honesty, and diligence to help deliver the promise that America has given me, but which still remains elusive to so many. I thank you for your belief in me, and feel the weight of the responsibility of your trust. I want to take a moment to thank my incredible staff, both official and campaign. It fills me with satisfaction when people approach me and tell me that I was the only office to return their calls, or when someone reaches out to thank me for the help we provided. My campaign staff fought a tough race under incredibly tough campaign conditions. I am grateful that they were nimble, innovative, but mostly, committed to creating a new future for our country. My duty to our country is a duty to the next generation and I am so proud that my office is an incubator for our next generation of leaders. In fact, they all have already begun that journey. Whatever the outcome of the election today, I hope we will all take an honest assessment of what we can do, personally, to unite our country, turn the temperature down, and get to the tough work of making sure that the millions of Americans who are struggling can get back on their feet. Thank you, Susie | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21147801/259745309/-1680923430?refcode=LEE_EM_FR_201103_SUSPERSONAL_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGE3NDIwNS1lZTFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-JjR8tN7zx6Jpm-WqQP6x6Qd4DAGri6gptV1Ui91upg=)

body:

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Georgia - TODAY is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235bf/1884230722/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Today is the day-- Election Day! It's your last chance to cast your vote and make your voice heard. Polls are open from 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM, so make sure you cast your ballot today! How do you plan to vote?
* **If you 're voting in person,** please vote at your designated Election Day polling place. To find your Election Day polling location, go to your ["My Voter Page"](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235bc/1884230722/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/back2HomePage.do"), visit [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235bd/1884230722/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com"), or call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). When you head to the polls, remember to take an [acceptable form of photo ID.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235ba/1884230722/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2")
* **If you 're returning a ballot, **remember that it must be received by your county elections office or put in a drop box in your county before 7:00 PM TODAY. To see if your county offers drop box locations, visit [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235bd/1884230722/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com"), call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683), or contact your county elections office. If your county does not have a drop box, you may return your ballot by hand to your county [elections office](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235bb/1884230722/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do") BEFORE 7:00 PM TODAY.

Please note: You may NOT return your ballot to any polling location; you MUST return it to either a drop box or your county elections office.
* **If you have requested but not received your absentee ballot,** please go to your Election Day polling location and vote in person. You will need to complete an affidavit to cancel your unvoted absentee ballot. If you have any questions, please call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683).

After you join the millions of Georgians casting their vote today, we invite you to [share your story](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235b8/1884230722/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform") about your voting experience to help Fair Fight Action continue to fight for free and fair elections in Georgia. If you have any questions, please visit [peachvote.com. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235b9/1884230722/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.peachvote.com") \- Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235c6/1884230722/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235c7/1884230722/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4eb/34a064cc/1a6b5a3f/70235c4/1884230722/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Dani?=
subject: It's Election Day! Are you ready?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6bac1aa36941/its-election-day-are-you-ready?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello! It's Election Day in Illinois. All of your support and hard work for Democratic candidates is about to pay off.

We want to make sure you're prepared for the day! First things first, have you voted yet? If not, in Illinois the polls will be open from 6am to 7pm today, and you can [find your polling place here.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=63e5d81622&e=140a9b81e7) If you are in line by 7pm, STAY IN LINE to make sure your voice is heard at the ballot box.

If you encounter or see any voter suppression or intimidation, make sure to call the voter protection hotline. The number is 224-990-2200.

Today is the day we have all been looking forward to for 4 years. Let's get out there and elect Joe Biden, Dani, and Democrats up and down the ballot!

Thank you!

Team Dani

name: =?utf-8?Q?Outvote?=
subject: Thank you.
body:
We would like to say thank you. | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | _Organizing for everyone._
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Friends,

We would like to say thank you. We are so, so grateful for all of the time, effort, and energy you have devoted to this moment, and for all of the big and small ways you have fought for progress over the last four years. Regardless of the results tonight, we continue to be inspired by the incredibly strong community of activists you have formed on the platform, and we are so proud to be helping fuel the fight for a more equitable America.

While we hope we can all celebrate some major wins this evening and in days to come, we’d like to share a few milestones that paved the way for this moment. Thanks to your work, **nearly 1,000 partner campaigns and organizations** (spanning all 50 states), **sent over 100 million text messages to voters nationwide**. More than 66% of the friends you texted confirmed they have submitted their ballots, and 72% of them were in battleground states. **In total, we have reached over 70 million people this election cycle on Outvote.**

If you haven’t yet taken a moment to vote, you can [find your polling place here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=5b0a593792&e=0aad15100c) and make a plan to get there before polls close. If you have already voted and want to do more, please remind your friends to go vote–it turns out it’s [one of the most effective things you can do](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=368dbf43c8&e=0aad15100c) to make an impact 🙂

No matter what happens today, we remain committed to the pursuit of justice, equality, and progress. We are honored to work every day alongside you.

Onward,

Naseem Makiya
CEO, Outvote

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Sylvester?=
subject: It's go time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Larry Sylvester for School Board
body:
Today, Mississippians will cast a ballot for President of the United States and stand up for what they believe. | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Today, Mississippians will cast a ballot for President of the United States and stand up for what they believe. Down your ballot, you will also have the opportunity to hire your next School Board Member.

This position will have a significant impact on the trajectory of our future, and, among other things, carry a heavy influence over property values, taxes and economic attractiveness within our county. I want to be a part of ensuring we are moving the needle in the right direction on these issues.

That’s why I’m applying for the job - because I believe DeSoto County will only be as strong as our local school system.

It has been an honor to serve you in the classroom at Northwest Mississippi Community College, but this election is about our future. Now, I am asking to serve you once again – this time as a DeSoto County School Board Member.

It will be my mission as a Board Member to listen and learn – then lead – on issues that allow us to continue improving the academic excellence and outstanding extracurricular activities for which we have become known.

I’m fully committed to putting localism first so that we can continue our recipe of success and serving those who are tirelessly working to equip the workforce of tomorrow with the tools they need to be successful today – our teachers.

I have the resume and I am here to apply for the job. I sincerely appreciate your vote and any support you are willing to give in helping me reach that goal today.

Larry

clean_body: Today, Mississippians will cast a ballot for President of the United States and stand up for what they believe. | | | | | | | Today, Mississippians will cast a ballot for President of the United States and stand up for what they believe. Down your ballot, you will also have the opportunity to hire your next School Board Member. This position will have a significant impact on the trajectory of our future, and, among other things, carry a heavy influence over property values, taxes and economic attractiveness within our county. I want to be a part of ensuring we are moving the needle in the right direction on these issues. That’s why I’m applying for the job - because I believe DeSoto County will only be as strong as our local school system. It has been an honor to serve you in the classroom at Northwest Mississippi Community College, but this election is about our future. Now, I am asking to serve you once again – this time as a DeSoto County School Board Member. It will be my mission as a Board Member to listen and learn – then lead – on issues that allow us to continue improving the academic excellence and outstanding extracurricular activities for which we have become known. I’m fully committed to putting localism first so that we can continue our recipe of success and serving those who are tirelessly working to equip the workforce of tomorrow with the tools they need to be successful today – our teachers. I have the resume and I am here to apply for the job. I sincerely appreciate your vote and any support you are willing to give in helping me reach that goal today. Larry | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Larry Sylvester for DeSoto County School Board.
