name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: It's Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends, today is the day!
Polls are officially open across the state. Make sure you vote today if you haven't already, and check in with family, friends, and coworkers to confirm they've all voted, too.
**[If you need information about polling locations and hours, click here to visit VoteinNH.org.](https://shaheen.bsd.net/page/m/29e680eb/60bbd690/12a83867/5389747c/1047292682/VEsH/?g=_7QyJK0LBwxcY8cXckI2TPA "https://www.voteinnh.org/") You can also call the Voter Protection Hotline if you have questions or issues: 603-GO-N-VOTE (603-466-8683).**
This is the most important election of our lifetime, and with so much at stake, we need to make sure every one makes their voice heard. If you are voting in person today, please bring a mask and take all necessary safety precautions.
We've worked so hard for this moment, and it's finally here. **Thank you for your support and make sure you get out and vote!**
Thanks again,
Jeanne
| | |
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Although so many of you have already voted and made your voices heard for Kat Cammack, President Trump, and other conservative fighters, we still have time to reach out to anyone who hasn't yet!

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: The polls just opened - get out and vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
It’s Election Day in Indiana and polls just opened all across our state. Hoosiers from every corner of the state are set to make their voice heard... | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Hey friend,

_**It’s Election Day in Indiana and polls are open all across our state. **_

_Hoosiers from every corner of Indiana are set to make their voice heard at the ballot box, and we’re excited here at Holcomb HQ. _

Everything that we’ve worked for is on the line today, and we’re counting on you to come through for Eric.

_This election is absolutely critical — re-electing Governor Holcomb is the first step toward continuing to build One Indiana for All. Governor Holcomb’s steady and experienced leadership has never been more important to getting Indiana back on track. _

**We’re counting on you to get out and vote for Eric. name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: TODAY is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ea/34a064cc/1a65f969/7023423/452651234/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Today is the day-- Election Day! It's your last chance to cast your ballot and make your voice heard. Go to [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ea/34a064cc/1a65f969/7023420/452651234/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://iwillvote.com") to confirm voting hours in your state and make sure you vote before the polls close! How do you plan to vote today?
* **If you 're voting in person**, please vote at your Election Day polling place or vote center, if offered. To find your Election Day polling location, visit [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ea/34a064cc/1a65f969/7023420/452651234/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://iwillvote.com") or call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). You can also check [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ea/34a064cc/1a65f969/7023420/452651234/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://iwillvote.com") to see if your state requires voters to bring ID to the polls.
* **If you 're returning a ballot,** go to [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ea/34a064cc/1a65f969/7023420/452651234/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://iwillvote.com") or call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683) to find where and when you must drop off your ballot.
* **If you have requested your absentee ballot but you did not receive it,** please go to your Election Day polling location and vote in person. Go to [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ea/34a064cc/1a65f969/7023420/452651234/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://iwillvote.com") to find your voting location. If you have any questions, call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683).

After you join the millions of Americans casting their ballot today, we invite you to [share your story](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ea/34a064cc/1a65f969/7023421/452651234/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://bit.ly/VotingExperience") about your voting experience to help Fair Fight Action continue to fight for free and fair elections. If you have any questions, please call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). \- Team Fair Fight Action |

| Peter,
Election Day is here! If you haven’t made it to the polls yet, **it's time to figure out when and where you will cast your vote today.**

**This is is going to be an incredibly close race.** The candidate who does a better job of turning out their supporters at the polls is going to be the candidate who wins, so **please make sure to vote!**

| The polls will remain open from 7:00 am - 7:00 pm tonight.

We’ve been working toward this day for a long time, and **I thank each of you for your support** during my campaign. **It’s time to bring strong leadership and real solutions back to the 32nd Congressional District**!
---
| Thank you and God bless,

| Genevieve Collins

subject: Go vote!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/g_SOHdpsz4vzDBko_DcNGB1Hqk9brFcEkbgI4cSyjsg=/ejUCiFmOZkQedZhwzsE6Ir_wNJFOQD_wSknHEswjEHM=?refcode=110320AM)
| | Friend, After months of hard work and waiting, Election Day is finally here. Please, if you haven't already, go vote today! [**Voting Information**](https://act.myngp.com/el/g_SOHdpsz4vzDBko_DcNGB1Hqk9brFcEkbgI4cSyjsg=/_zslrq8gWbPtV15m6s0IUWwAI8ukTyEFRxRwAOTg27o=) **You can drop off your absentee ballot at a designated location until 3pm or vote in person by 8pm tonight. ** As more voters have cast their ballots by mail, states need time to ensure every vote is counted before announcing results. **We might not know all the results of the election tonight, and that 's okay. Ensuring every vote counts is more important than having early results.** In order for our democracy to work for all of us, it must include all of us. Whether you live in Minneapolis or International Falls, are a first generation Minnesotan or a fifth generation Minnesotan, you are an essential part of our democracy and your voice matters. Thank you, Ryan Winkler Majority Leader Minnesota House of Representatives **P.S**. **If you or someone at your polling location faces barriers to casting your ballot - you can call the DFL Election Protection hotline to get the support you need. That number is 833-DFL-VOTE (833-335-8683).** [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/g_SOHdpsz4vzDBko_DcNGB1Hqk9brFcEkbgI4cSyjsg=/ejUCiFmOZkQedZhwzsE6Ir_wNJFOQD_wSknHEswjEHM=?refcode=110320AM)

body:
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0db2a631a0e3417386f557d7abd4b62d&_e=2o36vx5Y9YcINg1Opm1P-AfIv7fx1VPKzyjU2g1rLRaYFpABcsOZiSqhIVotd26kYZ3dB5slY4W6hj0s5piQwmsshebP_rT8qGgAoq0-oh9NVo2_ApuduLBQtKOyFx_270mW__UKgDKiL5C72bEr0Xo2WnYyVwsBkz_4lbkiSoF_xHsm-1OIv7jGjYbOWq90M1Vdqv86kFQAQFyTS8xmCd38ENZTWPAZyO8OUgfcpxAbGW7U3jO6T2_-Flz-u6QdGBroh0UMYOHSIlysnTBZ0ss6F7Sj_7qqGa3iikzyeBJZa0VjoYuGGfEE1RzUbGg7QO7xC7tQmitTTqjBcA3oocDLkpfP3bGa_NdWBznzk_U%3D) | |
---
Peter,
It's here! **Election Day is _TODAY_!**

**Every vote will matter in this election.**

We have been building upon our conservative successes, and we will continue to do precisely that. By casting your vote in this election, you can show your commitment to sending principled fighters to Washington. You can help keep every branch of government out of the Left’s hands. _**But it all comes down to getting out and voting.**___
[**_FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION >>>_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0db2a631a0e3417386f557d7abd4b62d&_e=2o36vx5Y9YcINg1Opm1P-JIGZzkDhXX5odLYShchtOiaFMAJ2FsIAT3MZ88AI5nu9jCdZGgYvgbgdvgYMAQT4o7wfp8NE52DRy1tZjeEo1TQDe-fMvkLxqdkGIv4cD7YB1Wi2uVi0xgXi-jwlTp0M2RnPE6-PEx6-Vn5Robll95ENjldOeRacUCl1mJgifoUcpdb-OIg0aIUkMnGINQ2CmAXj2PcAiXB-i5I7Keh1_vzQa5RpKhKgVY-sEVnGBbmoLCBY7fVdm2cMUFG9XydRP8SvyUXvLtlRs8XKQNCkvC63_ifDCoudUbenVg8qGHVZAG8XCD5KYiMoBbubULZ8eTEt-FULUcabzg1NovPz-viRMJ_NRDfy8iB1LibrKsqP_9WhgjQHUK8eRxg92Y5Aw%3D%3D)
Our constitutional rights are under attack by liberals, and we need elected officials who are prepared and willing to defend them. _**We need your vote! **_

\- Josh Hawley

P.S. **Will you forward this email to a few conservatives you know?** We have to make sure as many conservatives as possible show up to vote today.
|

clean_body: | | Peter, It's here! Election Day is TODAY! Every vote will matter in this election. We have been building upon our conservative successes, and we will continue to do precisely that. By casting your vote in this election, you can show your commitment to sending principled fighters to Washington. You can help keep every branch of government out of the Left’s hands. But it all comes down to getting out and voting._ Our constitutional rights are under attack by liberals, and we need elected officials who are prepared and willing to defend them. We need your vote! \- Josh Hawley P.S. Will you forward this email to a few conservatives you know? We have to make sure as many conservatives as possible show up to vote today. | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: ✔ VOTE TODAY 🗳
body:
The general election is TODAY and the polls are now OPEN! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/election-day-11-3-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=29e24cd185&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

It's early this morning and I know my team has sent you a lot of messages recently.

But this is it. **The general election is TODAY and the polls are now OPEN!**

I’m headed out to greet voters at the polls, and then spend the day rallying our supporters across District 113 to VOTE and get out their family and friends.

If you haven’t already, **please remember to vote**. Polls are open until 7:00pm. Find your polling place and more information at [www.WillDouglasForTexas.com/Vote](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=1f98a5dd88&e=4f010155df).

And **please forward this email to 5 people you know to remind them to vote!** This is an important election, and we need every vote.

Then after polls close, join us for our Election Night Party - it’ll be at our campaign office: 4111 Main St, Rowlett, TX 75088.

Thank you for your vote, your support, and your prayers. We wouldn’t be here today without you.

With gratitude,
Will Douglas

P.S. - we have volunteers helping us with poll-greeting around the district today. If you have an hour or two to help out, reach out to our political director Christian (214-210-6982) and he'll let you know where to go. Thank you!
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Today is the day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Make sure YOU vote. | | | |
---
| | | Friends,

First things first, I want to thank you. Election day is finally here and we could not have made it to this very important milestone without you.

The Democratic turnout for early voting was very high this year, so it's more important than ever that Republicans turn out big on election day. We can do this, but we need your vote to make sure it happens!

If I could ask you for one more favor, it would be to take your friends and family with you to the polls today.

_**Every single vote matters**_.
---
|
---
| I hope I have earned your trust this past year as someone you can depend on to represent your values and actually get things done.

We can not risk sending another vote for Nancy Pelosi and her radical policies to Washington D.C.

I'm asking for your support in the election today.

God bless you!

Jake LaTurner
---
|
---

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Voting Info
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voting_info&n=1)
---
Peter \-- It's a pretty important day as you well know. If we want to End Walz' Emergency Powers, at least four Democrats in the Minnesota House need to be fired today. Many Minnesotans have already cast their ballots. If you have not, DO NOT mail in a ballot today. Go in person. Your polling place may have changed this year due to COVID precautions. Click on this [link](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=ubk1FolAq6WRuAxNmhA93VJcs5l4BDTnm18Mfb6IJClEvnKesVxB86OO5zNOXJO-&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voting_info&n=2) to find your info. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=ubk1FolAq6WRuAxNmhA93VJcs5l4BDTnm18Mfb6IJClEvnKesVxB86OO5zNOXJO-&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voting_info&n=3 "Polling Place Finder") [Polling Place Finder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=ubk1FolAq6WRuAxNmhA93VJcs5l4BDTnm18Mfb6IJClEvnKesVxB86OO5zNOXJO-&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voting_info&n=4)
---
Think we have no hope in this election? Turn off that television you're watching and check out my perspective on how today's election will go.
## [My Election Prediction](https://www.action4liberty.com/election_prediction_trump_wins?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voting_info&n=5)
Thank you for your commitment to End Walz Emergency Powers. Get out and vote today!
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**

****
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=voting_info&n=6).

subject: No Regrets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FLORIDA FAITH AND FREEDOM COALITION, INCORPORATED
body:
Putting it all on the line.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zesMtKZclV6BrIP57g0g6bxm0TyBAsQozv_K0FXT2cLpeUl-ODL4J2lY-f1UyDn1PWZ0I0bfHOUXgiQJT1bysFrAfjr-AsRRBsFvg2gOMLmnB0q7hUa4wmGiPZHa1eQWZzxCj0xkkZsP4MOgu2z1blDAR8owuq6ZtWMUjmwNPefuSdDjTIaZWtQ2iQK0_bQujLNuaQfPr7tV_bM1cWmyTDku4eEWlqXTyNW4A6Cv5T2EORXIahj43ce_xfvE8r4NXDBWLdjjXrAORhBCkHzypKQlXOws6omxlZGYPKgtoDj_S8QamHhtlBP8u_SmHARyxiBjzcb7SmUnEkr_5quF6TKV0MbBYSDx-L8Wl1FFLDo=&c=578jMdQ8UKS_BY79P6gjE15Asv7MtUuYigtY5QV1IofXPxZshXdKhA==&ch=vLlqfXdKJwXImkgEeur2NlGuFyS_um3HxJtebMKrVoe9Ru52UcfL_Q==)
---
Friend,
---
I don't want to have any regrets about what more we could have done in these **final 24 hours**.
---
When it's all said and done, I want to be able to rest easy with a clear conscience knowing we fought tooth and nail to get every last faith-based voter out to the polls.
---
**Tomorrow night, as the results roll in, I want to be able to say we did EVERYTHING we could to _save _our_ beloved country from the radical Left_ \-- and I know you want to be able to say the same, Friend.**
---
[**Please make a last-minute contribution to our final get-out-the-vote push to ensure every last conservative gets out to the polls.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zesMtKZclV6BrIP57g0g6bxm0TyBAsQozv_K0FXT2cLpeUl-ODL4J2lY-f1UyDn1PWZ0I0bfHOUXgiQJT1bysFrAfjr-AsRRBsFvg2gOMLmnB0q7hUa4wmGiPZHa1eQWZzxCj0xkkZsP4MOgu2z1blDAR8owuq6ZtWMUjmwNPefuSdDjTIaZWtQ2iQK0_bQujLNuaQfPr7tV_bM1cWmyTDku4eEWlqXTyNW4A6Cv5T2EORXIahj43ce_xfvE8r4NXDBWLdjjXrAORhBCkHzypKQlXOws6omxlZGYPKgtoDj_S8QamHhtlBP8u_SmHARyxiBjzcb7SmUnEkr_5quF6TKV0MbBYSDx-L8Wl1FFLDo=&c=578jMdQ8UKS_BY79P6gjE15Asv7MtUuYigtY5QV1IofXPxZshXdKhA==&ch=vLlqfXdKJwXImkgEeur2NlGuFyS_um3HxJtebMKrVoe9Ru52UcfL_Q==)
---
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zesMtKZclV6BrIP57g0g6bxm0TyBAsQozv_K0FXT2cLpeUl-ODL4J2lY-f1UyDn1PWZ0I0bfHOUXgiQJT1bysFrAfjr-AsRRBsFvg2gOMLmnB0q7hUa4wmGiPZHa1eQWZzxCj0xkkZsP4MOgu2z1blDAR8owuq6ZtWMUjmwNPefuSdDjTIaZWtQ2iQK0_bQujLNuaQfPr7tV_bM1cWmyTDku4eEWlqXTyNW4A6Cv5T2EORXIahj43ce_xfvE8r4NXDBWLdjjXrAORhBCkHzypKQlXOws6omxlZGYPKgtoDj_S8QamHhtlBP8u_SmHARyxiBjzcb7SmUnEkr_5quF6TKV0MbBYSDx-L8Wl1FFLDo=&c=578jMdQ8UKS_BY79P6gjE15Asv7MtUuYigtY5QV1IofXPxZshXdKhA==&ch=vLlqfXdKJwXImkgEeur2NlGuFyS_um3HxJtebMKrVoe9Ru52UcfL_Q==)
---
We're putting it all on the line at the final hour -- and everything we've done this election cycle comes down to this.
---
We can't stop short of the finish line. **_We must push through to VICTORY!_**
---
_But there are still voters to be reached in these final 24 hours, and we can 't get them all out to the polls without your support._
---
[**So please, rush a last-minute contribution to the Florida Faith and Freedom Coalition to ensure every last conservative voice is heard this November.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zesMtKZclV6BrIP57g0g6bxm0TyBAsQozv_K0FXT2cLpeUl-ODL4J2lY-f1UyDn1PWZ0I0bfHOUXgiQJT1bysFrAfjr-AsRRBsFvg2gOMLmnB0q7hUa4wmGiPZHa1eQWZzxCj0xkkZsP4MOgu2z1blDAR8owuq6ZtWMUjmwNPefuSdDjTIaZWtQ2iQK0_bQujLNuaQfPr7tV_bM1cWmyTDku4eEWlqXTyNW4A6Cv5T2EORXIahj43ce_xfvE8r4NXDBWLdjjXrAORhBCkHzypKQlXOws6omxlZGYPKgtoDj_S8QamHhtlBP8u_SmHARyxiBjzcb7SmUnEkr_5quF6TKV0MbBYSDx-L8Wl1FFLDo=&c=578jMdQ8UKS_BY79P6gjE15Asv7MtUuYigtY5QV1IofXPxZshXdKhA==&ch=vLlqfXdKJwXImkgEeur2NlGuFyS_um3HxJtebMKrVoe9Ru52UcfL_Q==)

Thank you,
---
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zesMtKZclV6BrIP57g0g6bxm0TyBAsQozv_K0FXT2cLpeUl-ODL4J2lY-f1UyDn1PWZ0I0bfHOUXgiQJT1bysFrAfjr-AsRRBsFvg2gOMLmnB0q7hUa4wmGiPZHa1eQWZzxCj0xkkZsP4MOgu2z1blDAR8owuq6ZtWMUjmwNPefuSdDjTIaZWtQ2iQK0_bQujLNuaQfPr7tV_bM1cWmyTDku4eEWlqXTyNW4A6Cv5T2EORXIahj43ce_xfvE8r4NXDBWLdjjXrAORhBCkHzypKQlXOws6omxlZGYPKgtoDj_S8QamHhtlBP8u_SmHARyxiBjzcb7SmUnEkr_5quF6TKV0MbBYSDx-L8Wl1FFLDo=&c=578jMdQ8UKS_BY79P6gjE15Asv7MtUuYigtY5QV1IofXPxZshXdKhA==&ch=vLlqfXdKJwXImkgEeur2NlGuFyS_um3HxJtebMKrVoe9Ru52UcfL_Q==)

clean_body: Putting it all on the line. | == Friend, I don't want to have any regrets about what more we could have done in these final 24 hours. When it's all said and done, I want to be able to rest easy with a clear conscience knowing we fought tooth and nail to get every last faith-based voter out to the polls. Tomorrow night, as the results roll in, I want to be able to say we did EVERYTHING we could to save our beloved country from the radical Left \-- and I know you want to be able to say the same, Friend. == == We're putting it all on the line at the final hour -- and everything we've done this election cycle comes down to this. We can't stop short of the finish line. We must push through to VICTORY! But there are still voters to be reached in these final 24 hours, and we can 't get them all out to the polls without your support. == Thank you, == Mark Phillips Statewide Field Director Florida Faith and Freedom Coalition P.S. If you have not done so already, be sure to use our voter guide when you cast your ballot. == PAID FOR BY FLORIDA FAITH AND FREEDOM COALITION, INCORPORATED P.O. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Today is Election Day - Cast Your Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Election Day is finally here and if you haven't done so already, we encourage you to head to the polls and vote! We have the opportunity to bring new leadership to the 7th District that will fight for our interests and give Houston a voice in Congress. But, in order to do so, we need you to cast your vote.

[Find a polling location near you](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=acca57e47a3a40539a763c75bd4f0299&_e=iu03uuvTLvYcEez4vIm0hnO8Lkn6mhqomjOVCWGy3K12RGWZs4Rp2u0m_pPc79Bhlk0TxkCWcrzynx2YRU6uRFQN9RVGHebHyS99nWuHj8N7nXUbUdawAzO4p2PC4cIunRsULYyp6bGkSwcVg7TeYX6DdOmgVHJ63Bh8KbVYh1xYPCYdkorzb58IoMIX43DI8BvBfA3R9_Gbt40Ttm5M9_hHqjRmxaPuvhSdWpHt0DX-fTFAZ4vqO0tey7PgVtaWR8YuVk1MF5XzeLHzS3oYxQ%3D%3D) and go vote! This year Houston's energy jobs, the affordability of our healthcare, and the safety of our communities are all on the ballot. And while Representative Fletcher has failed to advocate for Houston and has instead sided with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time, Wesley Hunt has a record of service that will ensure the 7th District will be properly represented in Washington.

Your vote has never mattered more - vote for Wesley Hunt today!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

| Friend,

You have my word -- I will not stop fighting until the final vote is cast tonight.

Winning this race will mean the difference between protecting our Senate majority and handing it over to Schumer and the radical Left.

body:
Friend,
Let me tell you what's going to happen today:
Of the hundreds of state legislative elections taking place on this very day, as few as 42 of those races could determine as much as a 136-seat swing in the U.S. House. That could be the difference in Nancy Pelosi keeping her iron-grip on Congress.
Across 12 of our target redistricting states, at least 115 districts are currently held by a Democrat, but were won by President Trump in 2016.
_**Today is the day that we flip them to Republican.**_
Although we won't be certain about every outcome, there is one thing I'm sure of: we couldn't have done this without your help. We all know the wins we have today are a direct result of the investment you've made into our Republican State Majorities, and you've stepped up.
That's why I'm asking you to make one last contribution to be the difference between a loss and a win for some of our closest races.

After today, our fight is even more important. Our team will continue working to keep and maintain our State Majorities in runoffs and special elections all over the country. Nancy Pelosi and the radical Left will surely see these races that continue after Election Day as an opportunity to pick up seats and FLIP our State Houses from RED to BLUE.
[**I 'm asking you to contribute today to make sure State Republicans have the resources to continue fighting -- even after Election Day, in the toughest races that mean the most. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S5pBzvyhelB_9R8hxTRwbc2sC9DfmiLFLFtp_EmK0EgrBKhNKTm0iP6-vRGPFDnkgd-er6NjCvUPFzjC7nioIlu4TQG9N9HudvMJzbyfzNLkKE1PJvn91E306Ib3TpoO6uwoKnoJE9sPYu046Afy1-rWaRc3szTpcSTQXkyOe8Afi7aLxn76HtVcT3lUrwcZN8rfFv-TeUJY0_P96nkAv_u_Z8n8mH4paxMDjp2yUQMmP3xiOZ_EEuhM7ozUNFCfZzaNalR-uc98AWG3uj99JQgiI7pZvVlhsoFtVwx6X1jufWDKZQMTjHyI1UcV2LcvV5egjjeF4re6f_qf4seA9_uO7kxy8aaCm86BEZLX08RgZHhdMRVd5uLr1y8FACsI0_porBjo2vj47ipEA86UtOJqZgqT3zgHEAptidkPge9ivWHFJKwVEQt8ZhUY390gq32H_o1OgLI=&c=vcxhrjv2E0HmWw8aDdX_MEUk7WenkSKAshr2a_ZFw8DeYz-JLY549A==&ch=FAWWFHNtzvFCRevnZNp5mmvv_Z0v5TEkUhQiFCxsBBeYdftKqimNOQ==)

clean_body: Friend, Let me tell you what's going to happen today: Of the hundreds of state legislative elections taking place on this very day, as few as 42 of those races could determine as much as a 136-seat swing in the U.S. House. That could be the difference in Nancy Pelosi keeping her iron-grip on Congress. Across 12 of our target redistricting states, at least 115 districts are currently held by a Democrat, but were won by President Trump in 2016. Today is the day that we flip them to Republican. Although we won't be certain about every outcome, there is one thing I'm sure of: we couldn't have done this without your help. We all know the wins we have today are a direct result of the investment you've made into our Republican State Majorities, and you've stepped up. That's why I'm asking you to make one last contribution to be the difference between a loss and a win for some of our closest races. == After today, our fight is even more important. Our team will continue working to keep and maintain our State Majorities in runoffs and special elections all over the country. Nancy Pelosi and the radical Left will surely see these races that continue after Election Day as an opportunity to pick up seats and FLIP our State Houses from RED to BLUE. == You've stepped up before, and I'm asking you to step up again. Let's win this. Thank you, Austin Chambers President, RSLC == * To visit our website's about page, click ==. To make a secure, online contribution to support our critical mission, click ==. name: Michelle Steel
subject: Too close for comfort
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Today is Election Day -- it's the end of the line. If we can create a last-minute grassroots surge and quickly raise another $10,000.00 before polls close, we can bolster our GOTV efforts to reach those very few on-the-fence voters who will decide the election.

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Kw6rgqngwg5h0-2F4FbVJWQIqz8mS2xRHZRS0m6dW3Fvlymoi3SbLZIMdI2d88nwke1zRFHszVhg3t6XNzfykj3xBm8byTSEkSYZt46LD5nbH08IES0-IjLJMGcb1dU2aI7Zcliivk2bRXEOXm4jnA_UnsnUmtfd2LpOw34giUQop_B4dPXbQWzgn2Ccdu_6up-SD9cwu9C2hA_36swSBXdjA8jSTeWHNg1ca_6YAS-Fbs_UHvHx12fclPH1ge76-WHZVQfSPI_nb3JuNXJOS_arCXIIVjIqFWZ8D0Cw_l6xJwlqzlff_SSfkv_owBR8dktCNVjfuM-ZGHK9C30OS_n4xFsomgyIQnT4MFNZ1SGM_TDy_xu30UWQNj3bNzJ_zMu6TivX2b2-zP5sOqkep25BvNtpFErlDhzBv00chM=&c=LuLwK6mMiH7Anst94NwQiETTJWNFx7cnSXMtO_y3Z15nS9iUSjidJQ==&ch=OqjSLanKK8xwPCYVkITpZnAKObdHEXPMxGhvixjdU0--q7nrU11www==)
Friend, I have to ask you for one last favor.

Today is Election Day -- it's the end of the line. If we can create a last-minute grassroots surge and quickly raise another $10,000.00 before polls close, we can bolster our GOTV efforts to reach those very few on-the-fence voters who will decide the election.

[**Can you pitch in $10 right now?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Kw6rgqngwg5h0-2F4FbVJWQIqz8mS2xRHZRS0m6dW3Fvlymoi3SbANtTuEIYCzIFoE9yEA3xSUaEDC8KpB_SjyrZj5RbbzsqG4IyljNAykMAo_jiOIJ5WMmeo4mjMjpnUNzBCWMtsIKblxllUdpeaCT6WHq7YEMwxNwnL8KzH9iq2Kdx8Whd1rhVK4_XNBmFEtysE3U1oQbnIQxHQgQVTbVlR5OP6hB1fiSvB6CVB8TK_I5Fb-JZd3tez8BnJizU5eGqh5i17FU-QAjhCRdcgz2GbaDPeYGxjwv4ezwwnyNAiki5TAtrtPj_84CrEkto-wEj32rogkwfyDHl7ID_U229PViGrVXZZ91atU5PE2LcXmggowRIwKdy3-PEWllMyd7Apn4CjPxXKBR2hm8AQxsu3H1mRoqgqqvEQbTLcMGmCPLWt27EA==&c=LuLwK6mMiH7Anst94NwQiETTJWNFx7cnSXMtO_y3Z15nS9iUSjidJQ==&ch=OqjSLanKK8xwPCYVkITpZnAKObdHEXPMxGhvixjdU0--q7nrU11www==)

This race is going to be close. In fact, it'll come down to just a handful of votes. That's why POLITICO is STILL calling this race a TOSS-UP, Inside Elections thinks this seat is the most likely to FLIP in all of Orange County, and NOW Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race one of the TOP 30 MOST COMPETITIVE in the nation.

[**Your $10 contribution will help us reach that small, handful of voters who will decide whether we win or lose.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Kw6rgqngwg5h0-2F4FbVJWQIqz8mS2xRHZRS0m6dW3Fvlymoi3SbANtTuEIYCzIFoE9yEA3xSUaEDC8KpB_SjyrZj5RbbzsqG4IyljNAykMAo_jiOIJ5WMmeo4mjMjpnUNzBCWMtsIKblxllUdpeaCT6WHq7YEMwxNwnL8KzH9iq2Kdx8Whd1rhVK4_XNBmFEtysE3U1oQbnIQxHQgQVTbVlR5OP6hB1fiSvB6CVB8TK_I5Fb-JZd3tez8BnJizU5eGqh5i17FU-QAjhCRdcgz2GbaDPeYGxjwv4ezwwnyNAiki5TAtrtPj_84CrEkto-wEj32rogkwfyDHl7ID_U229PViGrVXZZ91atU5PE2LcXmggowRIwKdy3-PEWllMyd7Apn4CjPxXKBR2hm8AQxsu3H1mRoqgqqvEQbTLcMGmCPLWt27EA==&c=LuLwK6mMiH7Anst94NwQiETTJWNFx7cnSXMtO_y3Z15nS9iUSjidJQ==&ch=OqjSLanKK8xwPCYVkITpZnAKObdHEXPMxGhvixjdU0--q7nrU11www==)

The last two years have all built up to that one moment, just hours from now, when the polls close.

And right now, this race could go either way. But with a last-minute grassroots surge and a final GOTV boost, I know we can tip the scales of this tossup race in our favor.

[**So, Friend, can you chip in $10 right now to put us in the lead?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Kw6rgqngwg5h0-2F4FbVJWQIqz8mS2xRHZRS0m6dW3Fvlymoi3SbANtTuEIYCzIFoE9yEA3xSUaEDC8KpB_SjyrZj5RbbzsqG4IyljNAykMAo_jiOIJ5WMmeo4mjMjpnUNzBCWMtsIKblxllUdpeaCT6WHq7YEMwxNwnL8KzH9iq2Kdx8Whd1rhVK4_XNBmFEtysE3U1oQbnIQxHQgQVTbVlR5OP6hB1fiSvB6CVB8TK_I5Fb-JZd3tez8BnJizU5eGqh5i17FU-QAjhCRdcgz2GbaDPeYGxjwv4ezwwnyNAiki5TAtrtPj_84CrEkto-wEj32rogkwfyDHl7ID_U229PViGrVXZZ91atU5PE2LcXmggowRIwKdy3-PEWllMyd7Apn4CjPxXKBR2hm8AQxsu3H1mRoqgqqvEQbTLcMGmCPLWt27EA==&c=LuLwK6mMiH7Anst94NwQiETTJWNFx7cnSXMtO_y3Z15nS9iUSjidJQ==&ch=OqjSLanKK8xwPCYVkITpZnAKObdHEXPMxGhvixjdU0--q7nrU11www==) We have only a few hours to make a difference.

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

| With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help.****

name: Team Cornyn
subject: LAST CHANCE!
body:
Friend, Hours.
Hours remain between right now and when ballots will be counted.
Soon, this race will be over.
Texas will either be saved, or it will fall to the Liberal Mob.
The Senate will either stay red, or flip to a deep, dark blue.
**[It's true, Friend in just a matter of hours, we could lose it all.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH2tV--2bTGg8CSDWB6s9yqPOEatzor1gmKJpwifanIzh9Lmq6I6Nh2tWmoUrFA9MG8lSqAAK-q86e87OMuxuxASHSR3atSoGF6ai3xEBGXOrUKm6htib5quofxDphGCMvrVGl4mCSf9Cxz0JILIJGZJENqWpTWFJsmPbhkFYqXbCuzu8CdQas5zf_vqfGednkhuwUVRNUK14FIUMFSNqwsx6t_NwG8tMfVQz26uSEgn8QFYtKkMT56XdSooiyuOrKznWAGqImrfDlAyi4gJG88_YKdmwEPJHnkOorgZ2FD9rAZjo4-Rx8pt38ytVQvLgd3z0SToOWqlMtY9A-gbDF2EXuPRmN9Sb4Dk7rsob3E68B3qbS8AEA==&c=entsE7uBDyg6nobplN_lKUb5xYMM_deCNoxnytTLXAZFj9OIks3ybw==&ch=JD1dLI84GsIUOWSwac7kIHNDJYXh6EGDd9hbLnWKHlym97yCFB5FFA==) **
Court packing. Medicare for All. The Green New Deal. Defunding the police.
All of the things we've been warning you about for months now Chuck Schumer and MJ Hegar are literally within arm's reach from achieving it all.
From fundamentally transforming our nation and our way of life.
**[Friend, this is our very last chance to preserve America and save Texas.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH2tV--2bTGg8CSDWB6s9yqPOEatzor1gmKJpwifanIzh9Lmq6I6Nh2tWmoUrFA9MG8lSqAAK-q86e87OMuxuxASHSR3atSoGF6ai3xEBGXOrUKm6htib5quofxDphGCMvrVGl4mCSf9Cxz0JILIJGZJENqWpTWFJsmPbhkFYqXbCuzu8CdQas5zf_vqfGednkhuwUVRNUK14FIUMFSNqwsx6t_NwG8tMfVQz26uSEgn8QFYtKkMT56XdSooiyuOrKznWAGqImrfDlAyi4gJG88_YKdmwEPJHnkOorgZ2FD9rAZjo4-Rx8pt38ytVQvLgd3z0SToOWqlMtY9A-gbDF2EXuPRmN9Sb4Dk7rsob3HaBEtAtPYKFg==&c=entsE7uBDyg6nobplN_lKUb5xYMM_deCNoxnytTLXAZFj9OIks3ybw==&ch=JD1dLI84GsIUOWSwac7kIHNDJYXh6EGDd9hbLnWKHlym97yCFB5FFA==) ** [**FINAL CHANCE: 8X MATCH**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH2tV--2bTGg8CSDWB6s9yqPOEatzor1gmKJpwifanIzh9Lmq6I6Nh2tWmoUrFA9MG8lSqAAK-q86e87OMuxuxASHSR3atSoGF6ai3xEBGXOrUKm6htib5quofxDphGCMvrVGl4mCSf9Cxz0JILIJGZJENqWpTWFJsmPbhkFYqXbCuzu8CdQas5zf_vqfGednkhuwUVRNUK14FIUMFSNqwsx6t_NwG8tMfVQz26uSEgn8QFYtKkMT56XdSooiyuOrKznWAGqImrfDlAyi4gJG88_YKdmwEPJHnkOorgZ2FD9rAZjo4-Rx8pt38ytVQvLgd3z0SToOWqlMtY9A-gbDF2EXuPRmN9Sb4Dk7rsob3GBit0OUmFH7Q==&c=entsE7uBDyg6nobplN_lKUb5xYMM_deCNoxnytTLXAZFj9OIks3ybw==&ch=JD1dLI84GsIUOWSwac7kIHNDJYXh6EGDd9hbLnWKHlym97yCFB5FFA==) [**MAKE A RUSH DONATION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH2tV--2bTGg8CSDWB6s9yqPOEatzor1gmKJpwifanIzh9Lmq6I6Nh2tWmoUrFA9MG8lSqAAK-q86e87OMuxuxASHSR3atSoGF6ai3xEBGXOrUKm6htib5quofxDphGCMvrVGl4mCSf9Cxz0JILIJGZJENqWpTWFJsmPbhkFYqXbCuzu8CdQas5zf_vqfGednkhuwUVRNUK14FIUMFSNqwsx6t_NwG8tMfVQz26uSEgn8QFYtKkMT56XdSooiyuOrKznWAGqImrfDlAyi4gJG88_YKdmwEPJHnkOorgZ2FD9rAZjo4-Rx8pt38ytVQvLgd3z0SToOWqlMtY9A-gbDF2EXuPRmN9Sb4Dk7rsob3FZeCJn7KuWfg==&c=entsE7uBDyg6nobplN_lKUb5xYMM_deCNoxnytTLXAZFj9OIks3ybw==&ch=JD1dLI84GsIUOWSwac7kIHNDJYXh6EGDd9hbLnWKHlym97yCFB5FFA==) We're closer than ever, but there's still plenty of work to be done.

Team Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH2tV--2bTGg8CSDWB6s9yqPOEatzor1gmKJpwifanIzh9Lmq6I6NjiFMBXwn2Ag7q6FX39SeAqfm1ZaZG7wNyeD2HXWVXAz1Z5qHzU-LFDRGuRZ0yM-X8lDYrwh1VmFMPYEEalL8AssglSEihHJy9bzFcqyHDx5QVv1pkeRn-I=&c=entsE7uBDyg6nobplN_lKUb5xYMM_deCNoxnytTLXAZFj9OIks3ybw==&ch=JD1dLI84GsIUOWSwac7kIHNDJYXh6EGDd9hbLnWKHlym97yCFB5FFA==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH2tV--2bTGg8CSDWB6s9yqPOEatzor1gmKJpwifanIzh9Lmq6I6NsJo6eq3lE5udnWAUUcoN8R1jK7IUNPbDY5cARD0lpCTxxNTiSQK-0-9pAyvafSs6mPK1MtrioGWWLxvK3Ys2KJPTsJmkT5G-kkEA5oI2hIM&c=entsE7uBDyg6nobplN_lKUb5xYMM_deCNoxnytTLXAZFj9OIks3ybw==&ch=JD1dLI84GsIUOWSwac7kIHNDJYXh6EGDd9hbLnWKHlym97yCFB5FFA==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH2tV--2bTGg8CSDWB6s9yqPOEatzor1gmKJpwifanIzh9Lmq6I6NjiFMBXwn2Ag96XnDxmTkJGZQR6ugyc3QId2A5U5UriYhqO24ZLBBY1WVqJFny4K-lr6Vletf42_GwfVV4UlAJkCEZubnexVlc-Rm5M1mqJ8F20PjZ-x9eGeHqyvgPq_dQ==&c=entsE7uBDyg6nobplN_lKUb5xYMM_deCNoxnytTLXAZFj9OIks3ybw==&ch=JD1dLI84GsIUOWSwac7kIHNDJYXh6EGDd9hbLnWKHlym97yCFB5FFA==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BH2tV--2bTGg8CSDWB6s9yqPOEatzor1gmKJpwifanIzh9Lmq6I6NoFSoYtA5jTn9x7EHKK5aQNIVubnTDvzqnmE4FaTGbgUVgq-dzOM45skfrMo5qqc4OMv6nfzjzlDAZA1QajmitwGGe8Oz3k1YecVlU061Q5dWNICfP2q0SgFOKuYsfuX20Wn5E4I-H1fP_dkNoCdGrmMZD1801-z7rGP_7TshYitq-i8Xp7UKl8rYkh-LKTg5kZQ6MKJO0CO_H__jDOqbdexIt6oJjrIR42F35Pib640hrBV33T8iTZqOWn9-7uRJg==&c=entsE7uBDyg6nobplN_lKUb5xYMM_deCNoxnytTLXAZFj9OIks3ybw==&ch=JD1dLI84GsIUOWSwac7kIHNDJYXh6EGDd9hbLnWKHlym97yCFB5FFA==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible.

body:
Everything comes down to tonight

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HluWhfKsqXjujsy6ZZtVSR9Vi2hWUdGxmyydPzu9P0N3oOtJx_KqQnhqL2hVnGTDOYfFjr0KpE-F4rxk0_ClAAhAM3Zjsnuus9z3zxz_n4GPzXUJwIAx--cOQ2sGRY4fsooS8ZGo8P2eeLXGiuu_hLO8IyDD0xsoWoqUXK1YVogvYA6ta1PQEuB0hXqcK50r4v_0p0CsCb0DonrtbTuBePbWF6aPuoqnd2DgBhfWdKa4fUGMjYqvtft3undKiY-rnJRtZrFJ_Niw61OGrs0nNhjM9aRkHukbBX_b2rnOlUd-VgplE1Glj8KlT-ujiHrM6mR3_mRHzeGHBFIwROfValX5egepcpDZoK1yw0j9xaaPhL0HsNRiqHdMXEihCrUc&c=U8iBLR1fJf88PjhTMOmDe0QmoFtixTQSYKPY8KXIzD-0Gx1C26e6tA==&ch=TZ8z3EKOshMgo_x4WLsYIbxGRblBw_MZXb4-5tgVTyLOBHq9TJrhyw==)
Dear Friend,
This is it. After fighting back against **over $100 million** in false attacks and ridiculous smears, we are finally at the finish line. Tonight voters in Maine will decide who their next Senator will be.
There are only HOURS until the polls close, but we still have time to reach the final few undecided voters in Maine. So, I must ask you _**one final time**_**:[Can you chip in anything you can to my campaign before the polls close tonight?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HluWhfKsqXjujsy6ZZtVSR9Vi2hWUdGxmyydPzu9P0N3oOtJx_KqQnhqL2hVnGTDOYfFjr0KpE-F4rxk0_ClAAhAM3Zjsnuus9z3zxz_n4GPzXUJwIAx--cOQ2sGRY4fsooS8ZGo8P2eeLXGiuu_hLO8IyDD0xsoWoqUXK1YVogvYA6ta1PQEuB0hXqcK50r4v_0p0CsCb0DonrtbTuBePbWF6aPuoqnd2DgBhfWdKa4fUGMjYqvtft3undKiY-rnJRtZrFJ_Niw61OGrs0nNhjM9aRkHukbBX_b2rnOlUd-VgplE1Glj8KlT-ujiHrM6mR3_mRHzeGHBFIwROfValX5egepcpDZoK1yw0j9xaaPhL0HsNRiqHdMXEihCrUc&c=U8iBLR1fJf88PjhTMOmDe0QmoFtixTQSYKPY8KXIzD-0Gx1C26e6tA==&ch=TZ8z3EKOshMgo_x4WLsYIbxGRblBw_MZXb4-5tgVTyLOBHq9TJrhyw==)** In these final few hours, every single dollar can make the difference in reaching a last minute undecided donor. It would mean the world to me if you became an Election Day Donor before this campaign officially ends.

clean_body: Everything comes down to tonight == Dear Friend, This is it. After fighting back against over $100 million in false attacks and ridiculous smears, we are finally at the finish line. Tonight voters in Maine will decide who their next Senator will be. There are only HOURS until the polls close, but we still have time to reach the final few undecided voters in Maine. So, I must ask you one final time:== In these final few hours, every single dollar can make the difference in reaching a last minute undecided donor. It would mean the world to me if you became an Election Day Donor before this campaign officially ends. BECOME AN ELECTION DAY DONOR! == == == == Thank you for all your support over the past several months. Your help has allowed my campaign to fight back against the Far Left's absurd attacks against me. I have faith that we will win tonight, but I need you in these final few hours to stay with me! Thank you. Everything comes down to this. Susan Collins Paid for by Collins for Senator P.O. clean_body: don't miss this opportuniy Friend, I am going to be frank here. We have come down to the wire, and it is the last possible second to step-up and fight to keep Georgia RED. As you read this, David's opponent, Jon Ossoff's war-chest, is getting more dark money funneled in. RIGHT NOW , the most important election of our lives is upon us, and we REALLY need you, Friend. We have to finish this fight strong. == It's no secret that Ossoff has been supported by the liberal mob this entire campaign season. They are willing to spend MILLIONS on his race because they know he will push their radical agenda right onto you, Friend. == Radical policies like the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and defunding the police are all on the top of Ossoff's list to support in the Senate. He won 't listen to you, Friend; he'll get his orders from Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, and the rest of the far-left Senate democrats. This is the == you can make a difference in this race. == [[$500]](==) ==) [[$100]](==) ==) [[$50]](==) ==) Let's finish this fight, Friend. name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Happy Election Day! Your final voting resources.
body:
| | Peter, You have the chance to put your faith into action as you head to the polls today. Don’t be one of the 25 million Christians who will choose to sit out this election. If you have not yet voted, we have all the final resources to help you get ready to cast your ballot.
1. **[Find your Polling Place](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18HdAQlDb1n9Q0zecSwNILwd3S4Aq8yYZATSF-M5AMlkc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201103com01&n=1)**
2. **[View Every Candidate and Referendum on Your Ballot](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18fsb6bYz7sWlt-7NXJ7C2Xf6qBg4iG8QfSm4DqDSy90w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201103com01&n=2)**
3. **[Presidential Voter Guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18Fj8qrlDHqZbvJwCcZ6GMqhxJZOucExzfkRJfFXYNhKc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201103com01&n=3)**

If you have already voted, please remember to set aside time today to pray for the elections and for our nation. We’ve put together a [one-page powerful prayer](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjnils8FOPZXv7qrnZ9h4VbYUTfCtHtrgQv7t5fXorWApA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201103com01&n=4) for you. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjnils8FOPZXv7qrnZ9h4VbYUTfCtHtrgQv7t5fXorWApA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201103com01&n=5) Your voice and your vote matter. With so much at stake, we need Christians around the United States to stand together and let their faith fuel their votes today. **We encourage you to PRAY for the election, THINK biblically, and go VOTE!** Send this message to your friends and family and invite them to join you on this critical mission to **DO GOOD** and **GO VOTE.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18HdAQlDb1n9Q0zecSwNILwd3S4Aq8yYZATSF-M5AMlkc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201103com01&n=6) **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201103com01&n=7)
---

Friend,

**URGENT:** **Ratings change Arizona from LEAN DEMOCRAT to TOSS UP.** It's Election Day, and Arizona's Senate race is the most competitive race in the entire country.

**You have one last opportunity to make an impact on this race before all the ballots are cast, and I need you now more than ever.** [**Will you rush ANY AMOUNT now to defend this must-win battleground?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xMBX8SO1oh2551APNHW4NzPZKtAvk_4_4ZTpdgr6xs6Esn-CJjBnIQYtdcq0zuPce8B7paPB7hGPxqKVMWxgjhz2EvnjHbADkYmo5WTjSO_Nwey7y2ljyDiuwPdWQ03dNgOQPjKNuCEqPu50ERKUzEnwqLJ5DGwJMsCfmV8yrQ1b4ZOLbx2CruOoPAHRqo5nTcrilACBoUQuN4B4wMHdZElwBYAh1gnebX8XTZsChVIcNWbMPbPv5rOFKMiOzxTo5RPdFm4JvvxIWzsv6Bq1LxiWV3rdc64qlbPazJWRIjNP_03yyUpw19QdXzbHmMonbsSgNJXyU_8OLZLMhRU70NAhyxjVt70EYuFwpn1lf_eyJECTizg-j0NAFgRHccpZDL3yGe5wjklQ18GGy7V3WTrnRMQKAlEtm7qs2cIRc_FYi2kBrsEvTw==&c=gsACiE-PK_fpR6s9I_4a0J-DyqkWbNu2FOtJLyM3uegCi0n25iaN2Q==&ch=KwUB6pORzErJSFxVDhPyiIdPQaVp6zoL1clHs68gmAoyOqy2PLbLdg==)

name: Tom Emmer, NRCC Chairman
subject: Reaching out one last time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emmer for Congress
body:
Election Day is here, and I am reaching out ONE LAST TIME to ask for your support.

The stakes have never been higher, but I know that with your voice and your VOTE, President Trump and Vice President Pence will DEFEAT the Radical Left AGAIN. There’s no time to waste. We need YOU to head to the voting booth RIGHT NOW to cast your vote for President Trump. This is your chance to be a part of history with us. Find your SECURE Polling Place RIGHT NOW and head to the polls to cast YOUR VOTE. >> FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE >> The great American comeback is real and now it’s up to YOU to make sure Joe Biden and the Democrats don’t DESTROY my father’s unprecedented progress with their ridiculous tax policies and regulations. President Trump is the ONLY one who can Make America Great Again - he won’t stop until his work is done. Can we count on YOU to help us secure FOUR MORE YEARS? Head to the polls IMMEDIATELY to cast your vote to fight for American Greatness. VOTE NOW >> Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE >> Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. DonaldJTrump.com

name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: Polls Are Open Five More Hours
body:
We're in the home stretch.
Dear Peter,
**POLLS ARE OPEN FIVE MORE HOURS. No time to waste, make a plan and get your booty to the polls. **
Polls will close at 7 PM Central Time and 8 PM Eastern Time.
[Use this link to easily locate your Election Day polling location](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21157157/259781640/-505603136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzVmNjFjMi0wZDFlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSAxWPLP4g1uAt7e6Y4kBHV-VuGidc_iQurpWJLA0RE=&emci=03e63954-f11d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=3c5f61c2-0d1e-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892).
Here's a short list to help you make your plan to vote:
* What time will you go? In the morning? After lunch? After work?

* [Click here to find your polling location.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21157158/259781641/179162750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzVmNjFjMi0wZDFlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSAxWPLP4g1uAt7e6Y4kBHV-VuGidc_iQurpWJLA0RE=&emci=03e63954-f11d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=3c5f61c2-0d1e-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)

* Remember to bring your Photo ID. [The list of accepted IDs is at this link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21157159/259781642/-221411079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzVmNjFjMi0wZDFlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSAxWPLP4g1uAt7e6Y4kBHV-VuGidc_iQurpWJLA0RE=&emci=03e63954-f11d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=3c5f61c2-0d1e-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892).

* [Vote for Democratic candidates up and down the ballot!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21157160/259781643/-2139863518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzVmNjFjMi0wZDFlLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSAxWPLP4g1uAt7e6Y4kBHV-VuGidc_iQurpWJLA0RE=&emci=03e63954-f11d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=3c5f61c2-0d1e-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=6362892)

* Save the TNDP voter protection hotline number to your phone: 1-855-486-8386

**IF YOU HAVE ANY PROBLEMS VOTING, CALL US: **If you have any problems voting, do not hesitate to call the Tennessee Democratic Party Voter Protection Hotline number: 1-855-4VOTETN (1-855-486-8386). Remember, no voter should be turned away from the polls.
**This is it. Thank you for voting to save the soul of America.**
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

body:
Election Day is finally here! I need your help. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7b840657c385/i-need-your-help-910750?e=e4728463fc)
---
| |
---
| |
#### IT'S ELECTION DAY!

This race is coming down to today and we need EVERYONE to get out and vote. If you have voted, you can still help our campaign by telling your friends, family, neighbors, and coworkers to get out and vote Nehls for Congress.

I've served our district 28 years in law enforcement and our country 21 years in the US Army Reserve. The future of our country is on the line and we cannot afford to sit this election out. **We need EVERY freedom-loving American to vote.**

After you're done voting and encouraging your friends, family, neighbors, and coworkers to vote, come by our campaign HQ for our election night watch party.

**Where** : 1612 Crabb River Rd, Richmond, TX 77469
**When** : 7:00 PM CST
**What** : Election night watch party. Free food and drinks. Live music. Families welcome.

This has been a long road but we're finally here! We can win this with one final push!! I truly appreciate all you've done for me and our campaign.
####
\- Troy

name: MAGASOTA
subject: YOUR NEW NORMAL
body:
| Peter \-- **Today President Trump will be victorious!** History will be made. _Our constitutional republic will remain in place for another four years, God willing._ MAGASOTA has been working for 18 months to create the largest network of Trump supporters in Minnesota. Thousands of phone calls, text messages, and emails have gone out. Over 100 MAGASOTA meetups on record. We have had voter contact at over 10,000 doors. We had the biggest Trump rally with over 1300 people in attendance. We celebrated like rock stars. If you made those phone calls, donations and door knocks I would like to thank you. **_If you carved out the time to work for President Trump please congratulate yourself._** If you are a poll watcher or election judge -thank you. For those that did not commit any time to this election I am sorry for you. If you had any excuse for not even volunteering one hour of your time this last year, I am sorry for you. Believe me I heard every excuse under the sun. There is no excuse for not being active in this battle. Many of you may be offended by my words. _What I find offensive is the lack of participation in saving this great country -our home._ It's all we have and we should work like hell for it. This fight isn't the fight of our military or even our President. **It's YOUR fight!** **_Here is your new normal. It's waking up every day trying to keep this great nation FREE!_** **The psychopaths, our foreign enemies, BLM, Antifa the radical crackheads on the Left are not going to stop. EVER. Their mission never ends.** Thank God for President Trump exposing all of this corruption and evil. _Please I pray to God that you will wake up everyday and commit yourself to saving our country until your dying breath._ These days have been very emotional for many. We love our country and our President so much. Please step forward today boldly! Do not be intimidated or afraid! **God save America. God Bless President Trump!** -Michele Even

MAGASOTA
[](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_new_normal&n=1)[](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_new_normal&n=2)[](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_new_normal&n=3)[http://www.magasota.com/](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_new_normal&n=4)
---
-=-=- MAGASOTA · MN 55372, United States

Good morning, friend - it’s Nancy Mace.

It’s Election Day in America and polls are opening all across the country.

Voters are lining up at community centers, churches, and high school gyms, ready to cast one of the most important ballots in recent memory.

There is a lot riding on what we do today. The choices we make today are going to determine control of the Senate, House, and the White House, but the election results are going to have consequences that stretch far beyond Washington, D.C.

**They are going to determine whether our families pay higher or lower taxes, whether we can continue to keep our nation and our neighborhoods secure, whether we can continue to live the American Dream. **

There is so much on the line today, and we need to go all out — one final push to make sure that we give conservatives the best possible chance to win the House, and defend our values.

I’m reaching out now to ask you to rush one final donation and help maximize my chances of winning today. Can I count on you?

Nancy Mace

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=867b48b4e0bfddecc815a3ca3490ee815e8cef30a3b66bb985884d2c63a943bc527bfecdb2ac68660612058d977b62a34667c1a941905956

Friend,

It’s been a while since I last reached out, and you know I wouldn’t do it unless it was for a very special occasion.

I’ve just finished hand-selecting the feature photos for the Official 2021 Trump Calendar, and can’t wait to share them with Patriots, like you, who are committed to helping the President Make America Great Again.

| Peter,

I just wanted to reach out one more time before polls close at 8:00 PM.

Running to be your representative for Congress has been an honor and I am so unbelievably proud of everything we have accomplished.

In the final hours of this race, my team is working hard to reach last-minute voters across the district. Christina

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is it, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e84/1295558531/VEsH/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-email-logo?refcode=logo")

| | | Peter, this is it. Polls are open across North Carolina for the most important election of our lifetime.

Historic numbers of North Carolinians have already voted early, but this isn't over until the last vote is cast.

[North Carolina doesn't do landslide elections, so we can't take anything for granted. That's why I need your help to mobilize voters who haven't turned out yet in these final hours.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

We're so close to hitting our $400,000 Path to Progress Victory Fund goal, but our finance team tells me we're about [$7,000 short.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

[That doesn't seem like much, but remember how close things were in 2016. We only won by just two votes per precinct! That's right. Two!](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

We have to fight for every vote, Peter. Every donation will directly fund our final mobilization pushes - right now thousands of volunteers are making calls and texts to turn out as many folks as possible.

[If you've already voted and are wondering what you can do to help now, consider pitching in $10 to our Path to Progress Victory Fund before polls close to keep turning out voters. >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

**[CHIP IN $5 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1In0%3D/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

**[CHIP IN $10 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

**[CHIP IN $25 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

**[CHIP IN $50 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=50&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

**[CHIP IN $100 >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e87/1295558531/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110320_REAC_ALL&amount=100&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**

If you haven't voted yet, polls are open until 7:30 PM, and if you are in line by then stay in line! Head to [www.iwillvote.com](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e86/1295558531/VEsHBA/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://iwillvote.com/?state=NC") to find your polling place, and text or call 5 friends or family members to ask what their plan to vote is.

Thank you for your continued support of my campaign. It's up to us now, Peter. Let's bring this thing home.

Roy

_We hope everyone is staying safe during this ongoing health emergency. The Cooper Campaign is now working remotely, and we encourage all those who are able to practice social distancing. We 've taken the step of cancelling all in-person fundraising for the time being, making grassroots online outreach and fundraising even more critical than before. Roy and the rest of the team will keep working for a more prosperous, better-educated, and healthy North Carolina, and we hope you will stay with us in this fight. Further information on the Coronavirus and our response can be found [here.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200975/2fde7c66/4fb5a3a2/156e8e99/1295558531/VEsHBw/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://www.ncdhhs.gov/divisions/public-health/coronavirus-disease-2019-covid-19-response-north-carolina")_

name: Alice, Team Warner Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Election Day resources
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We're here to help.
|
---

| | Happy Election Day, Derek!

The most important election of our lifetimes is today.

If you haven't voted already, **here are some resources on how to vote safely and quickly** :
* Visit **www.iwillvote.com/va** to find your in-person voting location.
* Remember: **If you 're in line before 7 PM, you can still vote**, so stay in line!

**If you have questions or concerns about voting, call or text the Virginia Voter Hotline:**
* **CALL:** (844) 4VA-VOTE (844-482-8683)
* **TEXT:** "VOTEVA" TO 24365

Thank you for everything! **Now, let 's get out there, cast our ballots, and shape the future of Virginia and our country.**

-- Alice, Team Warner

---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Taking the Hill
subject: Here's how you can watch election results for our 29 endorsed House & Senate candidates tonight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Thank you so much for supporting the veterans and military family candidates of Taking the Hill. Today, we are watching and rooting for our [_**11 US Senate and 18 US House races in battleground districts**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EC_MexQNcf6blxA_kn-Dc8cmKVxdlHyCd6ilcJ4xaEM=/RQWfrXQBQI3qtR8hhy0puxNcVPSeXtz5n-_ysPJOc08=) across the country.

And we've made it easy for you to follow their real-time results! [_**We 've created a results tracker, updated live by our Executive Director, Roger Misso, where you can see the progress of all 29 of our candidates in one place.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EC_MexQNcf6blxA_kn-Dc8cmKVxdlHyCd6ilcJ4xaEM=/J823u5-0is8cmH_dhvHFHZjLv30kwWuyI5_4GPBpwsM=?usp=sharing)

We've also created a way for how you can help what happens next: defending the election results from teams of partisan lawyers hellbent on denying votes from being counted. [_**You can chip in to our ballot defense fund here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EC_MexQNcf6blxA_kn-Dc8cmKVxdlHyCd6ilcJ4xaEM=/RQWfrXQBQI3qtR8hhy0puxNcVPSeXtz5n-_ysPJOc08=)

We're going back to GOTV, but look forward to following the results with you tonight and as long as it takes until winners are declared!

_**-The team at Taking the Hill**_

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/EC_MexQNcf6blxA_kn-Dc8cmKVxdlHyCd6ilcJ4xaEM=/vRcgYJTuww3mP4aI6GTRp5Y9Tulf_WIYsIPdTnjNb5Q=).

We need your help to mobilize the final voters, organize the final volunteers, and reach the final citizens to ensure we SECURE FLORIDA for our pro-Trump movement. These final few moments are so important that I want to personally show President Trump a list of every patriot who stepped up today when I get to Washington. I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again, Friend - this isn’t just about my race. President Trump is counting on every district to do their part to get conservative voters to the polls in must-win Florida. And with the radical Left pouring over $100 million to try and buy our state’s votes, the President is leaning on his grassroots base more than ever in these final hours. I want him to know exactly who stood by him until the very end - and who gave up before our fight was finished. These are your final moments to choose which of those two groups you want to be in, and I hope you make the right choice. Thank you, Rep. name: Team Inslee
subject: Reach out to someone you know and love today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is our last chance.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8217%2E868730%2EpmoSIL) Friend, It's Election Day! We'll keep this short: You've probably already voted or made a plan to vote today. But before it's too late we wanted to say: Turnout this year might be historic, and if we can each convince one person we know to vote today, we can up those numbers even more. **[Click here to visit IWillVote.com and make a plan to vote today if you haven't yet, or forward this email to someone you know and love who might need a push to make their voice heard!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13603?t=4&akid=8217%2E868730%2EpmoSIL)** There's simply no such thing this year as a "safe" state -- we need a huge blue wave to combat any shenanigans Republicans throw in after polls are closed. We all have to show up and make our voices heard, and data has shown time and time again that the best people to persuade voters on the fence are their friends and family. **Reach out to someone you love and make sure they are voting today -- let's make history.** Thanks, Team Inslee | [VOTE TODAY](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13603?t=5&akid=8217%2E868730%2EpmoSIL)

name: Sara Gideon
subject: If you can give one more time to support our campaign before the polls close I would really appreciate it. The link to give is inside.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello.
I wanted to reach out one final time. This will be the last email you receive from me before the polls close tonight.
This campaign for Senate has been an incredible journey. Over the last year and a half, I have travelled to dozens of cities and towns across Maine. We have held forty Suppers with Sara. And I had the privilege of meeting so many Mainers all with such unique stories to share, which always reminded me why I got into this race in the first place.
So today, as this journey we have taken together is almost to a close, I am asking you one final time:
[**Will you make a contribution to support my campaign? There is still time to make a difference in this race. clean_body: Hello. I wanted to reach out one final time. This will be the last email you receive from me before the polls close tonight. This campaign for Senate has been an incredible journey. Over the last year and a half, I have travelled to dozens of cities and towns across Maine. We have held forty Suppers with Sara. And I had the privilege of meeting so many Mainers all with such unique stories to share, which always reminded me why I got into this race in the first place. So today, as this journey we have taken together is almost to a close, I am asking you one final time: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Sara Gideon and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Mainers, you have welcomed me into your homes and communities and I can't thank you enough for that. And tens of thousands of people have stepped up to make a contribution to support our campaign. Every single FEC deadline, we received considerably more individual donations than Senator Collins. Because of that support, we have come from behind in the polls and now this race is a dead heat. I couldn't have done any of this without you. So thank you, from the bottom of my heart. And if you can give just one more time to support our campaign, I would really appreciate it. "" Thank you again for sticking with me this far. Now let's finish this. All my best, Sara Gideon ""

body:
if you read nothing else this Election Day, please read this
|

| | I hate coming to you with this news on Election Day, but I have no other choice:

Fighting the GOP's final onslaught of dark money to secure NE-02's crucial Electoral College vote and save Bacon's seat has left my campaign bank account empty. [**_I need to raise $9,091 immediately or cease all campaign operations at the moment it matters most. I 'm devastated that it is coming down to this after all our hard work but I know I can win with your help. So I'm humbly asking, can you chip in to get us over the finish line? >>_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c0/77d4c309/223957fc/26358960/3712127305/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201103_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") **I 'm in this fight because I've seen far too many people suffer at the hands of Trump and the GOP.**

**People like my Mom.** She battled cancer _five times_. While her medical bills piled up, Congressman Don Bacon voted to dismantle the Affordable Care Act.

She died in 2017, after being homebound for a year because she could not afford $2,500 for a _single_ pill. | [](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c0/77d4c309/223957fc/26358960/3712127305/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201103_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
_Kara and her mother._
---
**People like my daughter, Sabina.** She makes me proud to be her mom every single day, and she deserves to live in a country where hard work is rewarded and she can get ahead.

One without gun violence, soaring student loan debt, and inaction towards climate change.

**People like my Field Director, Fatima.** She's a DREAMer and Omaha is the only home she's ever known.

Still, the GOP treats her and many other immigrants like political pawns, leaving Trump's handpicked judges to decide their fate.
[**Please Peter, I can defeat Don Bacon for my loved ones and yours, but only with the support of grassroots donors like you to keep me fighting until the bitter end:**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c0/77d4c309/223957fc/26358960/3712127305/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201103_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
| [Chip in $5 now >>](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c0/77d4c309/223957fc/26358960/3712127305/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201103_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---
My campaign starts and ends with folks like you, Peter, and everyone else that I'm fighting for.

Trump and the GOP think that they can swoop in at the final hour and defeat me in one final blitz.

But we've come this far -- and we know that we can't afford to lose.

So I'm asking you, Peter:
[**Before it 's too late, will chip in $15, or whatever you can, to help me flip this seat?**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c0/77d4c309/223957fc/26358963/3712127305/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201103_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c0/77d4c309/223957fc/2635896b/3712127305/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c0/77d4c309/223957fc/2635896a/3712127305/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c0/77d4c309/223957fc/26358915/3712127305/VEsHAg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

body:
There's so much left to do

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0183/1962438738/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Here's the situation, Peter -- | [PITCH IN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0182/1962438738/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201103.3nd__2481__&amount=10")
---
Voters are heading to the polls across Texas, and we're doing everything we can to contact them before they cast their ballot. We're planning a last-minute push today to reach these voters, and we need our grassroots army to dig deep right now and help put our message in front of as many voters as possible.

Here's the thing: we're behind on our goal. If we don't scale up we're going to have to make cuts to our outreach plan, and that means we won't hit every voter we need to. **This is urgent: every dollar you give helps us to reach these crucial voters today.**

I'm asking for your help because I know I can count on you to help us see this through. **[Can you chip in right now, Peter?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0182/1962438738/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201103.3nd__2481__&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0181/1962438738/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201103.3nd__2481__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0180/1962438738/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201103.3nd__2481__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0187/1962438738/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201103.3nd__2481__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0186/1962438738/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201103.3nd__2481__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0185/1962438738/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201103.3nd__2481__")**
I know you can help us finish the day strong.

Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director
MJ for Texas

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0182/1962438738/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201103.3nd__2481__&amount=10")
