|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb0184/1962438738/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2481&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891daa/7f51f7bc/584f02ab/4efb01fb/1962438738/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

Please VOTE today! It's the most important election in American history and your voice matters. Please vote Jim O'Connor for Corporation Commission | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/997da8ef99cd/jim-oconnor-for-corporation-commission-vote-now-3567738?e=66a0c3ba26)

| |
# VOTE TODAY!
VOTE JIM O'CONNOR FOR ARIZONA CORPORATION COMMISSION
_Make your voice heard in this important election._
**_This is the most important election in our lifetimes. Please get out and vote today! Your voice matters and your vote needs to be counted._**

I would be humbled to earn your vote for the Arizona Corporation Commission. With your vote, we can fight off job killing out-of-state political agendas, protect Arizonans from unfair utility rate increases, eliminate unnecessary government red tape, improve Arizona's small business environment, and ensure cheap, clean, reliable utilities for the millions of people who call our state home.

[**I make you this promise: I will always work to save you money, protect Arizona jobs, and keep Arizonans safe.**](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=4e74336913&e=66a0c3ba26)
---
|
---
|
# VOTE TODAY LIKE YOUR COUNTRY, STATE & FREEDOM DEPEND ON IT!

Already voted? ...Forward this email to your friends, family and co-workers. I need every vote possible and I need your help to do it!

Arizona Republicans, **_if you haven't already turned in your ballot please do it TODAY and cast your vote for me and the rest of the common sense Republican team for Corporation Commission._**

DON'T FORGET: Your employer is required to allow you to vote. Please don't forget, get side-tracked or wait until the last minute. We need your vote.

Find out about Republican candidates [HERE](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=8949fd852a&e=66a0c3ba26).

Find out where to vote [HERE](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=4049b71a72&e=66a0c3ba26).

**This election is the most important election of our lifetime.
We need YOUR vote.**

Peter,
On Sunday night, I joined Tucker Carlson on Fox News to discuss the dangers that giant technology corporations pose to our First Amendment right to free speech by actively censoring information as they see fit.

_**If you missed my interview, check out a clip by clicking the image below!**_
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0b0825e046c543ee9f2bd5bee38c30c7&_e=JgibMR_932OrofRkj-qM_kW-1c2kKSr0tkbDtZA9c70I9LJmHVRtBZCIOrwr0_QqnWsnF8gsLTwW15vy9uF5hQINrMFHDuOs6juvJvNFNH_yamyh5t6erU7CIf20WGGKCvwmJt6_YVr2g25qrljxIx3IvclaN3f1WdHoWbe226DnNXx9qhU-jcaU4G6V9FUMBD8IShyohWF1UgNju7IoxRaBKpPzNvXqxR-_Lq_zokfQoK9YIfmit8LzwjFt2q2qe21BJXNn7RRBUbSCOUwLR0DCy2T7welHD3QcqGhNX1ZY1QWMa7b8iNxOGILi2vJKPvUIYGVKIdT-tmiompwOUTNmPqmxttqNGsWtuX90aEcQElE7smEryt1thB4DrLC4kIj5pGnDp2hs7QmN-8TJEnB808L5U5JEZENS46wFIwQ%3D)

**Liberals are not complaining because their voices aren’t being silenced like ours!**

On this Election Day — certainly the most important in our lifetimes, and perhaps the most important in our nation’s history — **I am asking you to join my team to hold big tech monopolies accountable for suppressing our First Amendment right to free speech by considering a donation, of even $5, below. **

body:
Polls close at 6pm! If you haven’t voted yet, please get to the polls and cast a ballot for Eric! | |

---|---|---

**Friend — polls close at 6pm local time! **

_If you haven’t voted yet, please get to the polls and cast a ballot for Eric! You can find your polling location here: **[https://action.indiana.gop/2020](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ac20b557aa104ce6911ac50bf72c7cd3&_e=3248LhKDVS6e7Bs4sL6Lr2Y6B4mzbVDaKsMwy7TTLI4ApOziKtcqKFNhtim0ZYRcsrNxUo1XIeZ6ZdcKWcMTNHeqcRyEZ6tTHvtVx_O4PSBDO12lYeMANl8Gs50F0x8MRHB1bNSHuaxU6esdkLhwI4Cezp4R1_x-z1AogWYU6kyPUBhkS67wPtHbbUhjIuyp9_K65OzZ9Tu1LE1Z8bVKp0HnNsrTCYo9-DMoZWlCjHQraMvRNoDyWeFjKgo1kr5203pEMAqZw3fZbV5GKaB06cOMPIYy5YtJKh0BC5Y76mfWdRz48F9T2f9gx5ShA3XCeJU4x-hYQ-4Gwz5ppwaHfK75T2Hd5ohAcxP3VniKVdBDl9K8peEmGH-EbFTCjghEZuDxeAJ7MjEliYQEFvKE1xUyjKrC8dlejq2wvL9Z6w39DgNxsrI3c31LAK8UpbKEaBUipsnCTfIgBbdRYBhTMA%3D%3D)**_

This is the final push, and every single vote matters. We’re counting on Hoosiers like you to get to the polls before they close. If you’re in line at 6 pm, you get to vote.

**If you’ve already cast a ballot for Eric — thank you. Please make sure that your friends and family get out and vote, too.**

We’re honored to have your support. You’ll be hearing from us soon.

Sincerely,

Holcomb Crew

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: My thoughts Election Day! Why I voted for...
body:
My thoughts on Election Day! Why I voted for... | | | |
---
| My Thoughts On The Election, and why I voted for...
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! Election Day is here! I'm excited for today, and for the opportunity I had to cast my vote!**

**I want to encourage you and challenge you to vote. There is still time, and your county website can tell you where you can vote.

Secondly, I know that some of you may be undecided on your vote for President, or you may even be leaning towards Joe Biden for your own reasons \- as are many Christians and people of faith that I know. For those of you who have not voted yet, I would like to make one last case to vote for Donald Trump for President, and why both my wife Lisa and I confidently and gladly voted for Donald Trump for President. For those skeptics out there, please stay with me to hear why.

I believe God gives us an important instruction in Micah 6:8 - "He has shown you, O mortal, what is good. And what does the Lord require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God." The part of that verse that I have been thinking about the most recently is the "act justly" command from God - and yes it is a command. I fully believe that the Donald Trump administration is far, far, far better in enacting righteous and just policies than a Joe Biden and an eventual Kamala Harris Presidency would ever do.

>From helping the unborn, stopping sex trafficking, helping businesses and families with great economic policy, helping the Black community achieve their lowest ever unemployment numbers in history, standing for religious liberty, standing for free speech, putting phenomenal originalist minded Justices on the Supreme Court, standing for School Choice, standing for Israel, and much, much more....

Nationally renowned theologian Wayne Grudem has been adamant about his support for President Trump. He is one of the foremost authorities on Christian Systemetic Theology, his textbook is used by a great number of pastors, and he a great man of God. Pastor, author, and international speaker Bill Johnson also is a supporter of President Trump.

I could speak with anyone for over an hour on why I strongly support President Trump, and this email does not do it justice. However, please read the articles Wayne Grudem & Bill Johnson wrote in support of voting for President Trump to give you a _only a partial idea_ of why I highly recommend you casting your vote for President Trump.

Wayne Grudem on the good things President Trump has done \- [Link](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=4816e65523&e=b78e7c4d40)
Bill Johnson on why he is voting for Trump \- [Link](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=aac592149b&e=b78e7c4d40)
Wayne Grudem's response to John Piper on the issue of character \- [Link](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=4a2bcb5edc&e=b78e7c4d40)

God bless you!

#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=c245db46e9&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=00e6b71a9d&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=67e8c70db6&e=b78e7c4d40)

body:
Friend,

We are mid-way through Election Day and **you** **still have time to go to the polls and cast your vote**! Don't miss out on the opportunity to participate in this great American tradition. By casting your vote today you can help us bring new leadership to the 7th District - leadership that will fight for our interests and give us a seat at the table in Washington. [Find a polling location near you](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=ba4582b637214528af83ede4d7dcf775&_e=h1h3nNrUC4szdbBkfhPRNFHcZhZKjyZjwH7XM8-djKHPi63UJrf015P6ms3dn8I_T1_Bg_-_gzPkyuL5GlZLDMs9LT64hcQspNVnUU4jsr23O2KJBRwrq1_SAtYtFgb37lGpe-O5cQw0VhIdWORbdLOmZWGzf040oZIaVj-k4-AKew-BmLNWsZUWSIa8lub4SjzaJ9KrmaF5bwq3cJnqJZ9hYQgCEOkCP_phabREHzN_ufMFE7NciXYJbi3w3JDYOBEoHXQKfPJsyCAsItrJGw%3D%3D) and go vote!

And, be sure to RSVP to**join Wesley and Emily Hunt after polls close to celebrate Election Night and watch results come in at Kirby Ice House in Memorial, 1015 Gessner Road, 77055.** To RSVP, please email info@wesleyfortexas.com.

Thank you for supporting Team Hunt!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: This will forever be remembered as a climate election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
America isn't just choosing a president right now.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=4161%2E53494%2Epq_-nQ) Friend, America isn't just choosing a president right now. It's choosing a future. This election has presented the American people with a clear choice between perpetuating the unjust fossil fuel economy of our past or launching an all-out national mobilization to create millions of good-paying union jobs and realizing a clean-energy future. **[While voters continue to cast ballots and we wait (patiently, of course) for the outcome, read and then share our post on why the 2020 election will go down in history as a climate election.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1127?t=3&akid=4161%2E53494%2Epq_-nQ)** This election has been defined by the climate crisis. Not just the threats, of which there are many, but the opportunities as well. After winning the Democratic nomination, Joe Biden released the most ambitious climate plan ever put forth by a major party nominee. The plan -- which incorporated key elements of the Inslee, Warren, and Sanders plans -- was touted throughout the campaign in speeches across the country, on the debate stage, and in the first ever general election climate ad to run on TV. Joe Biden has made it clear that, under a Biden administration, investments in a clean-energy economy would be central to America's economic recovery and our ability to avoid the worst outcomes of the climate crisis. More than 80% of Democrats and more than half of Independents consistently rank government action on climate as a top priority, and two-thirds of registered voters say they support the Biden-Harris plan. After four years of a climate change-denying, fossil fuel-boosting federal administration, America is calling out for bold climate action. **[Whatever the outcome, this will forever be remembered as a climate election. Read Evergreen's post today for a look back on where we've been as we imagine what's to come -- and then share with your friends and family.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1127?t=4&akid=4161%2E53494%2Epq_-nQ)** Support for bold climate action has never been higher. We are eager to see which future the American people choose. Thank you, Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action | [SHARE ON TWITTER ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1128?t=5&akid=4161%2E53494%2Epq_-nQ)
---

subject: Friend, have you voted yet?

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Trump Administration Scores Another Win for Peace
body:
We congratulate Sudan, Israel, and the United States on another landmark diplomatic agreement ... These are real and significant diplomatic triumphs | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=377e4c0318&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Trump Administration Scores Another Win for Peace**

“We congratulate Sudan, Israel, and the United States on another landmark diplomatic agreement. The exchange of full diplomatic relations between Sudan and Israel is the third such Israeli-Arab agreement in two months. This achievement is not only historic but also morally and mutually beneficial,” the _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes.

“These are real and significant diplomatic triumphs for which the Trump administration deserves much credit . . . . Well done, Sudan. Well done, Israel. Well done, America.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77ab7da7fd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Last week’s rioting in Philadelphia barely registered on the national consciousness. In two days of mayhem, over 200 business establishments—liquor stores, Dollar Stores, sneaker stores, banks, clothing stores, and restaurants—were looted and torched; 57 officers were injured,” Heather Mac Donald writes. “Putting a lid on such reporting is not a public service.” Read more in [_City Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=463319ece2&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “No matter where you stand, the truth is that arbitrarily halting oil and natural gas development would do serious harm to our economy, jeopardize America’s post-pandemic recovery, and deny ourselves of a critical innovation engine for cleaner technologies,” Energy Secretary Dan Brouillette writes for [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a5dfe9b319&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Progressives in California in recent years have strengthened property rights—to other people’s property. Shoplifting has essentially been decriminalized, and retailers that apprehend thieves can be sued . . . In short, trying to protect one’s property can be a criminal offense,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d033efc48&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4320314942&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fd040dedf4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ce65bb6dd2)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: A Quick Election Day Video Message from Pat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
We have Jackie Walorski on the run. It's that close. We need you. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=df2c3e3140&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0a625e35b8&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Millions have already voted. If you're one of them, thank you! **

If you've not voted, please vote. Visit [vote.org](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=528c78d35a&e=5886ca081d) to find information on your polling place. There's still time to make it to the polls before they close at 6 p.m. It’s not too late to make your voice heard. This is no ordinary time, and this is no ordinary election.

Again, if you have already voted, thank you.

**We have Jackie Walorski on the run. It's that close. We need you!** Please find three more people, and help them to the polls.

As a principled Democrat, I will honor all the people in this district as your representative — Democrat, Republican, Independent alike. As an attorney, teacher, and small business owner serving our community for years, I understand the values that unite us in Northern Indiana.

**We can win this race. I ask for your vote.**

Friend, let’s win this together.

Pat
---
|
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=598d4ccacb&e=5886ca081d)

---
| | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=918f0bc1cd&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Let's Come Together, it's Election Day! 🏁 🕙
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA (R)
body:
Time to start building bridges |
---
| | [ ](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=e8a2565001&e=a212bb87cc)
---
| |
# Happy Election Day!
# Every peaceful election that passes is a victory for America and the democratic process. While we all want our champions to win and to see our party favorites prevail the more important issue is the peaceful transition of power that follows. The only way for this to happen is for Americans to respect our processes, our Constitution, and each other.

No matter what happens tonight, _let's continue the conversation_ on how we can truly make things better for all. Let's support those who go into public service with the goal of **statesmanship**. Let's foster _**respectful dialog**_ that is in the interests of us all. We may not always agree, but, at least we will understand each other better through respectful debate.

When you take time to pray for a good outcome tonight please join me in also praying for peace, wisdom, statesmanship, and a shared goal of continuing to improve the greatest nation that has ever existed on the planet. America is the last great shining city on a hill but only if we can keep it.

No matter the results of the Presidential election tonight I hope we wake up tomorrow as a nation more unified and more committed to the founding ideals of this nation.

God Bless America and always remember that our great nation should always come before partisan bickering.
I look forward to continuing the conversation.

May God Bless You All and may God Bless America!

[-Troy Downing](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=56d3b50352&e=a212bb87cc)
---

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: The polls are closed. (Stay in line!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
The polls have closed, friends!

(But if you’re waiting in line to vote, keep waiting. Election officials are required to let you cast your ballot.)

The last year has been quite the journey. We’re seeing unprecedented divisions in our country and I’m hopeful that with your enthusiasm and your vote we’ll start to bridge the gap right here in Central Texas.

I was honored when you chose me to be the Democratic nominee in the primary election and I hope that you continued to trust me with your vote in the general.

Win or lose, I’m proud of all that we’ve accomplished. In 2018, Republicans won this seat by 15 points, but this year will be different and it’s all because of our amazing volunteers, dedicated donors, and the daily effort of so many Democrats around our community.

So, thank you from the bottom of my heart.

- Rick

Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
Rick Kennedy for Congress
2203 Emmett Pkwy
Austin, TX 78726
www.RickKennedyforCongress.com [http://www.RickKennedyforCongress.com]

body: Background on Trump's declaration of day of remembrance for those killed by illegal aliens [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=9017&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmxvZy8yMDE4LzA3L2J1c3ktbW9udGgtZm9yLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYW50cy1jb21taXR0aW5nLWhlaW5vdXMtY3JpbWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3NsaW5rJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDMyMDEwMzY=] READ MORE [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=9017&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmxvZy8yMDE4LzA3L2J1c3ktbW9udGgtZm9yLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYW50cy1jb21taXR0aW5nLWhlaW5vdXMtY3JpbWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3NsaW5rJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDMyMDEwMzY=] [180x150x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=14562&F=T&] 2019-07-16 Illegal Aliens Released from Local Custody Commit More Crimes [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=14562&F=T&] Source: Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=14562&F=T&] Chris Crane, a veteran ICE agent who serves as president of the union that represents some 7,600 officers, reminds that this is only a tiny snippet of a national public safety crisis because the agency doesn’t have the manpower to track everyone released. “If I was working in a sanctuary city, my released criminal aliens that would reoffend would be more than five a year,” Crane said. [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=14562&F=T&] READ MORE [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=14562&F=T&] [180x150x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=20936&F=T&] 2020-10-20 70 Percent of Illegal Aliens in Federal Jails Convicted of Non-Immigration Crimes [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=20936&F=T&] Source: Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51959&L=20936&F=T&] More than 1,000 jailed illegal immigrants carried out racketeering and continuing criminal enterprise offenses such as murder for hire and 535 committed sex crimes that include production or distribution of child pornography. Around 1,028 aliens executed serious felonies such as kidnapping, murder, terrorism, rape and extortion. subject: ELECTION DAY: Midday Check In...
body:
| | | | [ ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0717bb6521&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | Dear Friends,

Here we are...All the work we have been doing to save our democracy comes down to this day. Over 100 million votes have already been cast in this election and there are still many more voters who are casting ballots today. Since the polls have opened this morning, the enthusiasm remains high. All across the country, people are waiting in line to vote. They remain undeterred. The Daily Kos has put together their great [map](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a3379a9ab4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to track when the polls close by state and region.
---
|
---
| We cannot let up for a single moment. Right now it's “all gas, no brakes”. If we want to have Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the next President and Vice President of the United States, then we have to work until the very end. The Biden campaign needs our help to turn out every potential voter on the last day of voting. You and those in your networks can join our E-Day phone banks until 11 pm ET.

The voting numbers are electric and there are still people who need to know where to go for good information now that they’re voting. ****
---
| **PLEASE amplify:**[IWILLVOTE.COM](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c0445c1932&e=d6c5c7d7ec) / [VOYAVOTAR.COM](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=329a24ea62&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

It is the most comprehensive and accurate source of voting information. There is a large team behind this ensuring data is rapidly updated with any changes happening on the ground, like additional polling sites being opened or extended voting hours. Also, if an individual voter has a question or is facing a barrier to voting, they should call the **National Voter Assistance Hotline number: 1-833-336-8683**. Please share this graphic for the National Voter Assistance Hotline widely. We want to make sure people know there are resources available to them if they are needed.
---
|
---
| Finally, yesterday, I shared a few guiding principles to help us through this extraordinary day. I hope you will take these principles to heart and share them widely. **_This election is ours to win!_**

Yours in the Fight,
Mũthoni
---
|
---
| **In this Update:**
* Phone Banking Opportunities
* Guiding Principles for Election Night

---
|
---
| **PHONE BANKING OPPORTUNITIES**
* Join us from 1-4pm ET with *surprise guests* Valerie Jarrett, Grateful Dead guitarist Bob Weir, and The West Wing's Melissa Fitzgerald and Mary McCormack. [Add to Your Calendar. ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cae6f4c54b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Join us from 5-8pm ET with *surprise guests* Mayor Eric Garcetti and The West Wing's Allison Janney, Dulé Hill, Richard Schiff, Melissa Fitzgerald and Mary McCormack. [ Add to Your Calendar. ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=569eba4b9a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Election Night Party and Phone Bank from 8-11pm ET to make that final difference. [Add to Your Calendar. ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e4e4be8738&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

---
|
---
| **GUIDING PRINCIPLES FOR ELECTION NIGHT
_(please share)_**

Encourage Calm:
* We have held elections through pandemics, during world wars and, in 2020, we are having a well-executed election.
* Over the last several weeks, a record 93.5 million voters have voted by mail and voted in person. In most states, they have been able to do so in a manner that works best for them.
* There have been some hiccups and issues with voting, but the overwhelming majority of voting has occurred without incident. And, while we have seen some instances of aggressive behavior from Trump supporters, by and large voting has proceeded smoothly and we have not seen large-scale or coordinated voter suppression or intimidation efforts.
* It’s all of our responsibility to not amplify President Trump’s rhetoric. His goal is to make voters feel too scared to vote. Don’t play into his hands.

Remind People of their Rights:
* If you haven’t already voted: vote. Go to[ iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0c69cc7775&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and find your polling information. If you are still holding onto your ballot, find your nearest drop box or county office and make your voice heard in this election.
* You have voting rights! They include, but are not limited to:
* The right to stay in line and vote if polls close while you are waiting inline
* The right to privately cast your ballot without interference
* The right to a paper ballot if you so choose
* The right to a provisional ballot if a poll workers tells you your name is not on the list
* The right to ask for a new ballot if you make a mistake on your ballot
* If you have any questions about your rights or trouble with voting:
* Call: 1-833-DEM-VOTE (English); 1-866-296-8686 (Spanish)
* Text: “ACCESS” to 43367 (English); “ACCESO” to 43367 (Spanish)

Don't get ahead of the Biden team:
* In calling the Presidential Race (whether it’s won, contested, or lost) we should wait for the official Biden channels (@JoeBiden // @TeamJoe) before we share anything.
* In calling states for the Presidential Race, we should wait for the official Biden channels (@JoeBiden // @TeamJoe) before we share anything. It’s likely they will “thank” the states as they are won.
* For Senate, Congressional, and down-ballot races, you should wait for official DNC channels (@TheDemocrats // @TomPerez // @TheDNC) to share the news. It’s likely they will be cautious in sharing results so as not to get put in the “penalty box” by Twitter. That’s okay. Our highest and best purpose is to not get any of our accounts frozen at any point throughout the night.

When they go low, we go high:
* Remember: Joe Biden has said numerous times, including during the last presidential debate, that he will be the president for every American-- including those who voted for him and those who didn’t.
* Make sure your messages are unifying and hopeful. This is what Joe Biden has tried to make this campaign about so honor your humanity and the humanity of others by not making callous or cruel remarks about anyone.
* As a general rule, do not engage with Trump supporters.
* Do not ridicule Trump supporters
* Do not wish ill on Trump supporters
* We joined this work because we believe in the potential of who America can and needs to be. Try to embody that today.

---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends, Here we are...All the work we have been doing to save our democracy comes down to this day. Over 100 million votes have already been cast in this election and there are still many more voters who are casting ballots today. Since the polls have opened this morning, the enthusiasm remains high. All across the country, people are waiting in line to vote. They remain undeterred. The Daily Kos has put together their great to track when the polls close by state and region. | | We cannot let up for a single moment. Right now it's “all gas, no brakes”. If we want to have Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the next President and Vice President of the United States, then we have to work until the very end. The Biden campaign needs our help to turn out every potential voter on the last day of voting. You and those in your networks can join our E-Day phone banks until 11 pm ET. The voting numbers are electric and there are still people who need to know where to go for good information now that they’re voting. ** | PLEASE amplify: / . It is the most comprehensive and accurate source of voting information. There is a large team behind this ensuring data is rapidly updated with any changes happening on the ground, like additional polling sites being opened or extended voting hours. Also, if an individual voter has a question or is facing a barrier to voting, they should call the National Voter Assistance Hotline number: 1-833-336-8683. Please share this graphic for the National Voter Assistance Hotline widely. We want to make sure people know there are resources available to them if they are needed. | | Finally, yesterday, I shared a few guiding principles to help us through this extraordinary day. I hope you will take these principles to heart and share them widely. This election is ours to win! Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni | | In this Update: Phone Banking Opportunities Guiding Principles for Election Night | | PHONE BANKING OPPORTUNITIES Join us from 1-4pm ET with surprise guests Valerie Jarrett, Grateful Dead guitarist Bob Weir, and The West Wing's Melissa Fitzgerald and Mary McCormack. Join us from 5-8pm ET with surprise guests Mayor Eric Garcetti and The West Wing's Allison Janney, Dulé Hill, Richard Schiff, Melissa Fitzgerald and Mary McCormack. Election Night Party and Phone Bank from 8-11pm ET to make that final difference. | | GUIDING PRINCIPLES FOR ELECTION NIGHT (please share) Encourage Calm: We have held elections through pandemics, during world wars and, in 2020, we are having a well-executed election. Over the last several weeks, a record 93.5 million voters have voted by mail and voted in person. In most states, they have been able to do so in a manner that works best for them. There have been some hiccups and issues with voting, but the overwhelming majority of voting has occurred without incident. And, while we have seen some instances of aggressive behavior from Trump supporters, by and large voting has proceeded smoothly and we have not seen large-scale or coordinated voter suppression or intimidation efforts. It’s all of our responsibility to not amplify President Trump’s rhetoric. His goal is to make voters feel too scared to vote. Don’t play into his hands. Remind People of their Rights: If you haven’t already voted: vote. Go to and find your polling information. If you are still holding onto your ballot, find your nearest drop box or county office and make your voice heard in this election. You have voting rights! They include, but are not limited to: The right to stay in line and vote if polls close while you are waiting inline The right to privately cast your ballot without interference The right to a paper ballot if you so choose The right to a provisional ballot if a poll workers tells you your name is not on the list The right to ask for a new ballot if you make a mistake on your ballot If you have any questions about your rights or trouble with voting: Call: 1-833-DEM-VOTE (English); 1-866-296-8686 (Spanish) Text: “ACCESS” to 43367 (English); “ACCESO” to 43367 (Spanish) Don't get ahead of the Biden team: In calling the Presidential Race (whether it’s won, contested, or lost) we should wait for the official Biden channels (@JoeBiden // @TeamJoe) before we share anything. In calling states for the Presidential Race, we should wait for the official Biden channels (@JoeBiden // @TeamJoe) before we share anything. It’s likely they will “thank” the states as they are won. For Senate, Congressional, and down-ballot races, you should wait for official DNC channels (@TheDemocrats // @TomPerez // @TheDNC) to share the news. It’s likely they will be cautious in sharing results so as not to get put in the “penalty box” by Twitter. That’s okay. Our highest and best purpose is to not get any of our accounts frozen at any point throughout the night. When they go low, we go high: Remember: Joe Biden has said numerous times, including during the last presidential debate, that he will be the president for every American-- including those who voted for him and those who didn’t. Make sure your messages are unifying and hopeful. This is what Joe Biden has tried to make this campaign about so honor your humanity and the humanity of others by not making callous or cruel remarks about anyone. As a general rule, do not engage with Trump supporters. Do not ridicule Trump supporters Do not wish ill on Trump supporters We joined this work because we believe in the potential of who America can and needs to be. Try to embody that today. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | iwillvote.com | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com DNC Community Engagement 430 S Capitol Street, SE Washington, DC 20003 USA

body:

#
Hello!

We wanted to make sure that you got an invitation to our [Election Night Virtual Celebration](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=27f9de7115&e=140a9b81e7) \- the event kicks off TONIGHT at 8pm!

Your support is the reason we've gotten this far, and when we cross the finish line we want to celebrate with you! Join us and hear from Dani, and other candidates running for office throughout IL-16 as we watch the results come in!

Even though we can't have the type of get-together we all envisioned, we can still celebrate together this Tuesday! [Click here to register for the event](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7cc9b32c5b&e=140a9b81e7), and we'll see you there!

Thank you for all your support.

Team Dani

P.S. We still need help making calls to get out the vote down this last stretch! [Can we count on you to make some calls?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=fd5afc8260&e=140a9b81e7)

subject: Georgia voters- polls close at 7:00 PM!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ed/34a064cc/1a7d6087/70234bb/202568692/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Record numbers of Georgians have already made their voices heard this election-- will you join them? The clock is ticking, but you still have time to vote! **Polls close at 7:00 PM today. If you get in line by 7:00 PM, you will be allowed to vote. ** **Voting in person?** Remember to vote at your designated Election Day polling location. Double check your polling place by reviewing your "[My Voter Page"](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ed/34a064cc/1a7d6087/70234b8/202568692/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/back2HomePage.do"), visiting[ IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ed/34a064cc/1a7d6087/70234b9/202568692/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com"), or calling 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). Many polling locations in Georgia have moved since the last election; please check your polling place's location! When you head to the polls, make sure you have an [acceptable form of photo ID](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ed/34a064cc/1a7d6087/70234c6/202568692/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2") with you. **Returning your ballot?** It must be received by your county elections office or put in a drop box in your county before 7:00 PM today! To see if there are drop box locations in your county, visit [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ed/34a064cc/1a7d6087/70234b9/202568692/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com"), call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683), or contact your county [elections office](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ed/34a064cc/1a7d6087/70234c7/202568692/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do"). If your county does not have a drop box, you may return your ballot by hand to your county elections office BEFORE 7:00 PM TODAY. Please note: You may NOT return your absentee ballot at any polling location; you MUST return it to either a drop box or your county elections office. **If you have requested but not received your absentee ballot,** please go to your Election Day polling location and vote in person. You will need to complete an affidavit to cancel your unvoted absentee ballot. If you have any questions, please call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). After you vote, please [share your story](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ed/34a064cc/1a7d6087/70234c4/202568692/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform") of your voting experience with us. For more information, go to [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ed/34a064cc/1a7d6087/70234c5/202568692/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.peachvote.com"). Thank you for showing up and making your voice heard. \- Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

name: Kat for Congress
subject: RELEASE: Kat Cammack Wins Race for Florida's Third Congressional District
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: November 3, 2020
---
| Contact: Derek Dufresne derek@rightvoter.com; 202-809-6013 AND Faith Allen faith@katforcongress.com; 772-285-5001
---
| Kat Cammack Wins Race for Florida's Third Congressional District
---
|
---
| Gainesville, FL - Kat Cammack, Republican Nominee for Congress in Florida's Third Congressional District, is announcing her win for Florida's Third Congressional District.
Cammack, 32, will be the youngest Republican woman serving in the 117th Congress.
Kat Cammack gave the following statement in response:
"As your next Congresswoman, I have been entrusted to represent each and every person who calls Florida's Third Congressional District home, and for that I am incredibly honored. In January, I will take an oath to the United States Constitution, not a political party, and I vow to represent all Americans. After losing my family's cattle ranch to a failed Obama-era program in 2011, I promised myself to never give up or allow another family to have the same experience mine did. Only in the United States of America would I be able to go from being homeless to the U.S. House of Representatives in 10 years, and I will always fight for Florida's families the same way I would my own. Looking forward, I am excited to get back to work for the community here in FL-03."
Kat Cammack is a small business owner, a proud wife to a first responder, an alumna of the United States Naval War College, and the longtime former Deputy Chief of Staff to the District.

###

|
---

Krysty, the girls, and I just returned from the polls, and from the bottom of our hearts, we want to say thank you to everyone who has supported this campaign. We've asked a lot of you over the last year, and every time we asked, you rose to the occasion.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Krysty, the girls, and I just returned from the polls, and from the bottom of our hearts, we want to say thank you to everyone who has supported this campaign. We've asked a lot of you over the last year, and every time we asked, you rose to the occasion. Your contributions to this campaign, whether it was a one time donation of $10, a $25 recurring donation, or more, have made it possible for us to fight for our shared New Mexico values, and it has been an honor to fight alongside you. Take just a minute to watch the video below to hear from my family and how grateful we are for your support. The polls are still open and we hope that you will come out and support our campaign if you haven't already! | Thank again for everything, Mark P.S. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: LAST CHANCE: Vote today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Friends, this is your last chance to make your voice heard and vote in this election.**
Voted already? Be sure to check in with family, friends, and coworkers to confirm they've all voted, too!
**[If you need information about polling locations and hours, click here to visit VoteinNH.org.](https://shaheen.bsd.net/page/m/29e680e5/60bbd690/12a1f5a8/538974c9/2771051228/VEsH/?g=_7QyJK0LBwxcY8cXckI2TPA "https://www.voteinnh.org/") You can also call the Voter Protection Hotline if you have questions or issues: 603-GO-N-VOTE (603-466-8683).**
If you are voting in person, please bring a mask and take all necessary safety precautions. **If you are still waiting in line to vote when polls close, stay in line - you will still be able to vote!**
Thank you so much for your support,
Jeanne
| | |
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To keep up with the latest, follow us on [Twitter](https://shaheen.bsd.net/page/m/29e680e5/60bbd690/12a1f5a8/538974c8/2771051228/VEsE/?g=_7QyJK0LBwxcY8cXckI2TPA "https://twitter.com/JeanneShaheen"), [Instagram](https://shaheen.bsd.net/page/m/29e680e5/60bbd690/12a1f5a8/538974d7/2771051228/VEsF/?g=_7QyJK0LBwxcY8cXckI2TPA "https://www.instagram.com/jeanneshaheen/") and [Facebook](https://shaheen.bsd.net/page/m/29e680e5/60bbd690/12a1f5a8/538974d6/2771051228/VEsC/?g=_7QyJK0LBwxcY8cXckI2TPA "https://www.facebook.com/jeanneshaheenNH/").

subject: Polls Close at 6 p.m. Local Time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
You can still make it to the polls. There's still time to demand change. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9c65f658d5&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7a989438b1&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend,

One hour (or two, if you're on Central time). That is all the time that is left to demand change, to demand Dignity and Justice for All, to demand that our voices and values are restored to Washington.

Polls close at 6 p.m. local time. There's still time to make it to the polls. It's not too late to make your voice heard. Visit vote.org to find information on your polling place.

Millions have already voted. If you're one of them, thank you!

**We have Jackie Walorski on the run. It's that close. We need you!** Please find three more people, and help them to the polls.

As a principled Democrat, Pat will honor all the people in this district — Democrat, Republican, Independent alike. As an attorney, teacher, and small business owner serving our community for years, she understands the values that unite us in Northern Indiana.

Again, if you have already voted, thank you.

This is no ordinary time, and this is no ordinary election. **We can win this race. Pat asks for your vote.**

Friend, let’s win this together!

Patrick
---
|

body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e85c50091bce237c/44bfd16b4c3e7d09c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, Thank you so much for all of your support leading up to today. I’m so proud of the campaign we ran, and I’m honored that the good people of Oklahoma trust me to continue representing them in Congress. Over the past couple of years, we’ve accomplished quite a lot. I’ve protected Oklahomans’ Second Amendment rights. I’ve protected religious liberty and free speech. I’ve protected the right to life for the unborn. There is still a lot left to be done, and I’m excited for the opportunity to serve as your Congressman once again. Thanks again, Kevin id:2020-10-15-19:41:18:515t Paid For By Hern For Congress

clean_body: Dear Peter, Thank you so much for all of your support leading up to today. I’m so proud of the campaign we ran, and I’m honored that the good people of Oklahoma trust me to continue representing them in Congress. Over the past couple of years, we’ve accomplished quite a lot. I’ve protected Oklahomans’ Second Amendment rights. I’ve protected religious liberty and free speech. I’ve protected the right to life for the unborn. There is still a lot left to be done, and I’m excited for the opportunity to serve as your Congressman once again. Thanks again, Kevin id:2020-10-15-19:41:18:515t Paid For By Hern For Congress

subject: Polls Close in 90 Minutes - Go Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Polls close in just 90 minutes and if you haven't voted yet, we encourage you to head to the polls and cast your ballot! There is still time for you to make your voice heard and vote. We have the opportunity to bring new leadership to the 7th District that will fight for our values and prioritize the needs of Houston, not those of Nancy Pelosi. But we need your help to get it done. Cast your vote today and help us bring new leadership to the 7th District!

If you're still uncertain, you can find polling locations near you with the following link: https://www.harrisvotes.com/WaitTimes

Thank you for your support!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt
